Vahşi siyonist ordusunda kazan kaynıyor
content: Yedioth Ahronoth gazetesinin haberinde, Genelkurmay Başkanı Eyal Zamir ile Savunma Bakanı Yisrael Katz'ın atamalar konusunda yaşadığı anlaşmazlık nedeniyle orduda bir tür kaosun hakim olduğu belirtildi. Savunma Bakanı Katz'ın, Genelkurmay Başkanı Zamir'in kendisine danışmadan yaptığı üst düzey atamaları askıya aldığına dikkati çekilen haberde, şu ifadelere yer verildi: "İsrail ordusu, istifa dilekçelerini sunan subay ve astsubayların toplu halde ayrılabileceği sorunuyla karşı karşıya. Şu ana kadar görevlerinden muaf tutulmaları için dilekçe veren subay ve astsubay sayısı 500'e ulaştı." İsrail ordusunda komuta kademesinin üst üste sunulan istifa dilekçelerinden sonra uyarılar yaptığına dikkati çekilen haberde, "Bu da ordunun insan gücünde gerçek bir krizde olduğunu gösteriyor" ifadesi kullanıldı. Ordudaki insan gücü krizinin tüm yaş ve rütbelerde baş gösterdiği, düzenli orduda görev yapan askerlerden daha fazla istifa dilekçelerinin gelebileceğinin öngörüldüğü belirtildi. İsrail ordusunda istifa dilekçesi veren 500 kişinin yedek subaylardan değil düzenli görevdeki subaylardan oluştuğu aktarılan haberde, özellikle Gazze savaşında maaşların düşük kalmasına bağlı olarak istifa taleplerinin oluştuğu kaydedildi. Haberde, "Ordu, binlerce subay ve astsubayı düzenli olarak hizmete devam etmeye ikna etmekte zorlanıyor, bunun sonucunda ordunun seviyesinde bir düşüş bekleniyor" ifadesi kullanıldı.

content: Fenerbahçe Beko, Basketbol Avrupa Ligi'nin (EuroLeague) 16. haftasında konuk ettiği Yunanistan ekibi Panathinaikos AKTOR'a 81-77 mağlup oldu. Bu sonuçla sarı-lacivertli takım, bu sezon EuroLeague'de 6 maç sonra ilk, toplamda ise 6. yenilgisini yaşadı. Panathinaikos ise 10. galibiyetini elde etti. Savunmaların ön plana çıktığı ve iki takımın da hücumda düşük yüzdeyle oynadığı ilk periyot, Panathinaikos AKTOR'un 17-16 üstünlüğüyle tamamlandı. İkinci çeyrek karşılıklı basketler başladı. Pota altını etkili kullanan Yunanistan ekibi, 17. dakikada farkı çift hanelere taşıdı: 27-37. Bu bölümden sonra savunmasını sertleştiren Fenerbahçe, basit hatalar yapan Panathinaikos karşısında peş peşe bulduğu basketlerle 19. dakikada farkı 3'e indirdi: 36-39. Yunanistan temsilcisi, soyunma odasına 41-37 önde gitti. Fenerbahçe Beko, karşılaşmanın ikinci yarısına etkili ve hırslı başladı. 11-0'lık seri yakalayan sarı-lacivertliler, 25. dakikada skoru 48-41'e getirdi. Pota altından kaydettiği basketlerle farkı azaltmaya çalışan Panathinaikos AKTOR karşısında kalan bölümde de iyi oyununu sürdüren Fenerbahçe, 3. çeyreği 57-50 üstün bitirdi. Dördüncü ve son periyotta sahneye çıkan Hernangomez ile art arda sayılar bulan Panathinaikos AKTOR, 34. dakikada öne geçti: 60-62. title: Bağışıklığı güçlendiren 10 öneri
content: Beslenme ve Diyet Uzmanı Müzeyyen Çelik, doğru ve dengeli beslenmenin bağışıklık sistemimizin en temel yakıtı olduğuna dikkat çekerek, "Çünkü vücudumuz savunma hücrelerini üretmekten onları aktive etmeye kadar her aşamada kaliteli besin öğelerine ihtiyaç duyar" dedi. Kış mevsiminde sağlıklı beslenmenin sadece yeterli miktarda yemek anlamına gelmediğine işaret eden Beslenme ve Diyet Uzmanı Müzeyyen Çelik, "Sağlıklı beslenmek; doğru vitamini, minerali ve antioksidanı doğru şekilde ve gerekli miktarda almak anlamına gelir. Bu nedenle C, D, A ve E vitaminleri ile çinko, selenyum ve omega-3 kaynaklarını günlük beslenmede tüketmek büyük önem taşır. Ayrıca, uzun açlıklardan kaçınmalı, her öğünde kaliteli protein, sağlıklı yağ ve lifli besinlere yer verilmelidir" bilgisin verdi. Beslenme ve Diyet Uzmanı Müzeyyen Çelik, kış aylarında bağışıklık sistemimizi güçlendiren beslenme kurallarını anlattı. 1. Yemeklerinize günde bir diş sarımsak ekleyin. 2. Çorbalarınıza kemik suyu ilave edin. Çorbalarınıza veya yemeklerinize günde bir kepçe (yaklaşık 100 ml) eklemeniz kış aylarında güçlü bir savunma sağlayacaktır. Ancak kan kolesterol düzeyiniz yüksekse kemik suyunu haftada iki kezden fazla tüketmemelisiniz. 3. Zerdeçal ve karabiberi birlikte kullanın. 4. C vitamini kaynağı meyve yani portakal, mandalina, kivi şart. 5. Sofranızda haftada en az iki kez balık olsun. 6. Her gün bir avuç kuruyemiş tüketin. Günde bir avuç...

title: Από την Αδελαΐδα στο στούντιο της “Φωνής της Ελλάδας”- Η διαδρομή ζωής της Χρυσούλας Μελισσινάκη και του Παναγιώτη Μαυραειδή
content: του Γιώργου Κεραμιδά Στο στούντιο της «Φωνής της Ελλάδας» , του παγκόσμιου ραδιοφώνου της ΕΡΤ και συγκεκριμένα στην εκπομπή “Κουβέντες μακρινές” με τη Νατάσα Βησσαρίωνος, φιλοξενήθηκαν χθες Δευτέρα 15 Δεκεμβρίου, από την Αδελαΐδα η Χρυσούλα Μελισσινάκη κ αι ο Παναγιώτης Μαυραειδής , δύο άνθρωποι της ελληνικής διασποράς που εδώ και 14 χρόνια έχουν χαράξει τη δική τους πορεία στην Αυστραλία, χωρίς όπως τόνισαν να μετανιώσουν ούτε στιγμή για την απόφασή τους. Ο Παναγιώτης Μαυραειδής , γεννημένος στην Αυστραλία, επέστρεψε σε νεαρή ηλικία στην Ελλάδα, όπου σπούδασε, υπηρέτησε τη στρατιωτική του θητεία και εργάστηκε σε διάφορες εταιρείες. Η οικονομική κρίση – μολονότι δεν είχαν οικονομικά προβλήματα – αποτέλεσε την αφορμή για ένα νέο ξεκίνημα, αυτή τη φορά μαζί με τη Χρυσούλα Μελισσινάκη, με προορισμό την Αδελαΐδα. Η επιλογή της περιοχής δεν ήταν τυχαία, καθώς εκεί υπήρχαν συγγενείς και φίλοι, αλλά και βαθιές προσωπικές ρίζες. Όπως ανέφεραν, η μετανάστευση υπήρξε μια μεγάλη πρόκληση, καθώς έπρεπε να δημιουργηθούν από την αρχή σε όλα τα επίπεδα. Ωστόσο, πίστεψαν στον εαυτό τους και ο ένας στον άλλον και μέσα από σκληρή δουλειά, κατάφεραν να σταθούν και να προχωρήσουν. «Δεν φοβηθήκαμε ποτέ τις δυσκολίες που θα αντιμετωπίσουμε, γιατί το θέλαμε πάρα πολύ έντονα. Ήταν στόχοι ζωής με ποιότητα », σημείωσαν χαρακτηριστικά, υπογραμμίζοντας πως βασικός τους...

title: غزة.. انتشال 30 شهيدا من تحت الأنقاض
content: - غزة.. انتشال 30 شهيدا من تحت الأنقاض انتشلت طواقم الإنقاذ، اليوم، جثامين 30 شهيدا من تحت أنقاض منزل عائلة فلسطينية بحي الرمال غربي مدينة غزة. وأفاد جهاز الدفاع المدني في قطاع غزة في بيان اليوم، أن طواقمه انتشلت جثامين 30 شهيدًا من تحت أنقاض منزل عائلة فلسطينية، مشيرا إلى أن الطواقم تواصل العمل على انتشال 30 شهيدًا آخرين ما زالوا تحت أنقاض المنزل ذاته، في ظل ظروف ميدانية بالغة الصعوبة. وأوضح أن هذه الجهود تُنفذ بمشاركة الهيئة العربية لإعادة إعمار غزة، ولجنة الطوارئ وإدارة الاستجابة السريعة، إلى جانب الأدلة الجنائية والطب الشرعي في محافظة غزة، ووزارتي الصحة والأوقاف، وذوي الشهداء المفقودين، وتجمع القبائل والعشائر. وتواصل قوات الاحتلال الإسرائيلي، منذ السابع من أكتوبر 2023، ارتكاب إبادة جماعية بحق سكان قطاع غزة، شملت القتل والتجويع والتدمير والتهجير والاعتقال، في تجاهل تام للنداءات الدولية وأوامر محكمة العدل الدولية بوقف العدوان.

title: צה"ל: לוחם נהרג מירי בבסיס בצפון, מצ"ח פתחה בחקירה
content: צה"ל: לוחם נהרג מירי בבסיס בצפון, מצ"ח פתחה בחקירה אמיר בוחבוט עודכן לאחרונה: 16.12.2025 / 23:09 הלוחם נפצע באורח קשה ופונה לקבלת טיפול רפואי בבית החולים אך במהלכו נפטר מפצעיו. הודעה נמסרה למשפחתו. עם סיומה של החקירה יועברו הממצאים לבחינת הפרקליטות הצבאית שתף ב וואצאפ שתף ב פייסבוק שתף ב טוויטר שתף ב אימאייל שתף ב general לוחם צה"ל נהרג כתוצאה מירי בבסיס צבאי בצפון הארץ / דובר צה"ל לוחם צה"ל נפצע באורח קשה במהלך היום (שלישי) כתוצאה מירי בבסיס צבאי בצפון הארץ. הלוחם פונה לקבלת טיפול רפואי בבית החולים אך במהלכו נפטר מפצעיו. הודעה נמסרה למשפחתו. בעקבות האירוע נפתחה חקירה של המשטרה הצבאית החוקרת, עם סיומה יועברו הממצאים לבחינת הפרקליטות הצבאית. בשלב זה, דובר צה"ל מסרב למסור פרטים חדשים אודות התקרית. חייל צה"ל שיצא לחופשה נהרג במהלך הלילה כתוצאה מתאונת דרכים אזרחית במרכז הארץ. פרטי התאונה מתוחקרים על ידי משטרת ישראל. יוסף חיים רבוח , חייל צה"ל שיצא לחופשה, נהרג בחודש אוקטובר האחרון בביתו שבקריית ארבע מפליטת כדור של חברו, שוטר מג"ב. החייל והשוטר היו חברים קרובים ותכננו לצאת לבלות יחד. לפי החשד, לפני שיצאו מהבית, הדגים השוטר פעולה באקדחו, ואז נפלט כדור שפגע בחייל וגרם למותו. החייל פונה לבית החולים, אך שם נקבע מותו.

"Ньюкасл" — "Фулхэм". Прогноз и варианты ставок на матч Кубка английской лиги 17 декабря
content: Для "Ньюкасла" нынешний турнир начался с домашней встречи с "Брэдфордом" (Д3) — и ожидаемо легкой победы 4:1. Затем учеников Эдди Хау поджидало, казалось, куда более серьезное испытание — битва с "Тоттенхэмом". Однако они оказались сильнее и его — 2:0. А вот у "Фулхэма" на пути к нынешнему поединку таких соперников не было и близко — "Бристоль Сити" (Д2), "Кембридж Юнайтед" (Д4) и "Уиком Уондерерс" (Д3). И все равно без приключений не обошлось: с последним из этих оппонентов команда португальца Марку Силвы справилась еле-еле — лучше провела серию пенальти (5:4). А так, и "сороки", и гости из Лондона — середняки премьер-лиги. У них поровну побед (по шесть) и схожее число очков (22 и 20 соответственно). А их октябрьский матч чемпионата, который прошел на этом же стадионе, закончился победой хозяев — 2:1 (Д.Мерфи, 18, Бруно Гимарайнс, 90 — Лукич, 56). Ну а мы предлагаем следующие варианты ставок. Во-первых, (кф. около 1,7). Во-вторых, (кф. около 1,8).

content: A NORTHERN town set for a residential boom in the coming years is part of the Summer Plan Dining Cashback program.Located about 40km north of Adelaide, Two Wells is quickly becoming a destination spot for those looking to enter the housing market.Ample upgrades and funding slated for the town’s centre have reshaped what used to be a quiet country area.While many will associate Two Wells with being part of the north’s major growth pipeline, few would loop the town into the recent algal bloom event affecting the state’s coast.Despite this, two retailers operating at Two Wells have qualified for the Dining Cashback program, which aims to support coastal hospitality businesses and SA seafood retailers affected by the bloom.The program entitles holders of a Dining Cashback to 50% cashback (up to the value of $50) when purchasing at participating businesses.*South Australians aged 18 and over can enter the ballot now via southaustralia.com/diningincashback for a chance to win a Dining Cashback in the next draw on 2 January 2026.One of the participating businesses in the program is Michalantos Fisheries, which aims to deliver quality seafood to country areas.A staple of the Riverland, the Michalantos food van also frequently finds its way to Two Wells, giving locals access to top quality fresh seafood.As a retailer of South Australian seafood, the van qualifies as a participating business in the Dining Cashback program.Michalantos is not the lone retailer in the area taking part in...

title: Gaza families struggle to recover from days of torrential rains that killed 12 people
content: DEIR AL-BALAH, Gaza Strip (AP) — Palestinians in Gaza struggled to recover Tuesday from torrential rains that battered the enclave for days, flooding camps for the displaced, collapsing buildings already badly damaged in the two-year war and leaving at least 12 dead, including a two-week-old baby. The downpour, which dumped more than 150 milliliters (9 inches) of rain on some parts of Gaza over the past week, turned dirt lanes to mud and flooded tents in camps for displaced people.
creator: abdel kareem hana - ap

title: Trennung von Ehefrau Patrice: Daniel Aminati meldet sich erstmals zu Wort
content: Patrice Aminati hat am Dienstag die Trennung von Ehemann Daniel öffentlich gemacht. Nun geht der Moderator auf Trennung und Zukunft ein.Patrice Aminati (30) hat am Dienstagabend überraschend die Trennung von Ehemann Daniel Aminati (52) bekanntgegeben. Bereits im September hat sie ihn verlassen, erklärte sie in einer Instagram-Story. Wenige Stunden später meldet sich der Moderator zu Wort."Sehr dankbar für diese gemeinsame Zeit""In guten wie in schlechten Zeiten", beginnt er einen Instagram-Beitrag. "Das war und ist für mich nicht nur ein daher gesagtes Lippenbekenntnis." Besonders seit der Krebsdiagnose seiner Ehefrau habe er alles getan, um die Familie zu unterstützen und zu schützen. Er habe sein eigenes Leben hintenangestellt und würde jederzeit wieder so handeln, erklärt er."Ich bin sehr froh, dass meine Frau lebt und wir diesen Kampf vermutlich gewonnen haben und meine Tochter eine liebende Mutter hat", schreibt Aminati weiter. Nun sei eigentlich Zeit, wieder mehr Raum für ein "normales" Leben und neue Pläne zu schaffen. Doch dazu wird es nicht kommen. "Die ganzen kräftezehrenden Therapien, starken Medikationen, Gehirnbestrahlungen, die Todesängste, die haben bei meiner Frau Spuren hinterlassen", schreibt Daniel Aminati. Er betont: "Es steht mir fern, sie zu verurteilen, weil sie jetzt einen anderen Weg gehen möchte."Er wünsche ihr alles Gute und werde weiterhin für sie da sein. "Ich bin sehr dankbar für diese gemeinsame Zeit und so viele unfassbar...

title: 암 치료 버텨낸 청년들, ‘취업 차별’에 또 고통
content: 기사를 읽어드립니다 Your browser does not support the audio element. 0:00 게티이미지뱅크 광고 ( ☞한겨레 뉴스레터 H:730 구독하기. 검색창에 ‘한겨레 h730’을 쳐보세요.) “입사 지원서에 2년 동안 암 투병을 했다는 걸 적었어요. 1차 서류 심사에서 계속 떨어졌죠.” 혈액암을 앓았던 오세웅(35)씨는 다시 취업을 한다는 것이 한없이 높은 벽이었다고 했다. 오씨는 2020년 8월 암 진단 뒤 2년 동안 열심히 치료를 받아, 건강을 되찾았다. 병원에선 5년이 지나야 완치 판정을 해주지만, 그 전이라도 몸이 회복되고 증상이 없으면 일상 복귀는 얼마든지 가능하다. 오씨는 헬스케어 업계에 취업하려고 여러번 문을 두드렸지만, 번번이 실패했다. 혹시 암 투병 이력 때문인지, 지레짐작만 할 뿐이다. 오씨는 “치료를 받았던 2년 동안 ‘사회적 공백’이 있으니까 암 투병 사실을 밝혀야 한다고 생각했다”며 “아팠던 것이 숨길 일도 아니지 않냐”고 말했다. 광고 오씨는 취업이 아닌 새 길을 찾기로 마음먹었다. 그는 지난 8월 자신과 같은 청년 암 경험자들의 취업을 연결하는 스타트업 ‘암뮤니티’를 만들었다. 암 치료를 끝내고 다시 사회로 복귀하기가 너무 힘들지만, 도움은커녕 간단한 것을 물어볼 곳도 없었던 자신의 경험에 비춰 사회적 연결망이 필요하다고 생각했기 때문이다. 청년 암 경험자들은 일자리 찾기가 치료만큼 힘들다고 호소한다. 이제 막 사회에 진출하는 청년들은 경력이 없거나 짧아 더 막막하다. 오씨는 “채용 공고를 낸 업체...

title: Copa: Fifa anuncia lote de ingressos mais baratos para países classificados
content: A Fifa anunciou, na tarde de hoje, uma carga especial de ingressos mais baratos para pessoas de países participantes da Copa do Mundo de 2026. Veja detalhes Bilhetes do tipo serão comercializados por um preço fixo de US$ 60 (R$ 327). O valor é o mais baixo comercializado pela entidade em duelos do mundial. Há ingressos do tipo para todos os jogos da Copa, incluindo a final . Ao todo, são 104 partidas englobadas. Cada federação nacional será responsável pela distribuição da carga . A Fifa determinou que os países usarão "seus próprios critérios de elegibilidade e processo de inscrição", mas reforçou a necessidade de "ligação" entre as pessoas e a seleção de seu país. Eles devem garantir que esses ingressos sejam destinados especificamente a torcedores fiéis e com forte ligação com suas seleções nacionais comunicado da Fifa A entidade informou que a medida é um incentivo para que torcedores viajem para acompanhar a Copa de perto. Canadá, EUA e México serão os anfitriões do torneio, que começa em junho do ano que vem — a final está prevista para o dia 19 de julho. É a primeira vez que a Fifa organiza um sistema com ingressos mais baratos em uma Copa do Mundo.
creator: bruno madrid

title: Sindicato de jogadores se posiciona contra gramado sintético: 'Luta antiga'
content: O Sindicato dos Atletas de Futebol do Rio Janeiro (Saferj) se posicionou e argumentou contra a utilização de gramados sintéticos no futebol brasileiro. O que aconteceu O Saferj demonstrou apoio aos clubes que desejam extinguir a utilização deste tipo de gramado . O sindicato diz manter contato com atletas, que têm relatado lesões não só imediatas, como também a longo prazo. Para o Saferj a grama sintética acarreta não somente lesões imediatas, mas, também a longo prazo. O sindicato tem relatos de atletas com lesões acentuadas crônicas de coluna, tendões e em articulações, pelo impacto gerado pelo piso mais duro. Saferj, em nota enviada ao UOL A entidade diz que há "um número expressivo" de jogadores contra o uso do sintético e que eles não se sentem à vontade para se pronunciar . O sindicato destacou a importância de os atletas serem ouvidos. Como trabalhamos para ser a voz dos atletas e muitos não se sentem à vontade para se pronunciar, podemos afirmar que um número expressivo é contra jogar em gramados artificiais, não esquecendo que são eles que fazem o espetáculo acontecer. Entendemos que, antes do interesse econômico de qualquer dono de clube ou presidente, os jogadores precisam ser ouvidos. Alfredo Sampaio, presidente do Saferj O sindicato defende a utilização apenas da grama natural, mas se posiciona a favor da padronização . Sobre a qualidade dos gramados naturais, entendemos que a CBF deveria padronizar o tipo de grama e a altura...

title: Emine Erdoğan'dan 16. Büyükelçiler Konferansı'na ilişkin paylaşım
content: Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan'ın eşi Emine Erdoğan, 'Türkiye'yi farklı coğrafyalarda temsil eden büyükelçilerimizin, Sıfır Atık hareketinin evrensel mesajını görev yaptıkları ülkelerde de yaygınlaştırma gayretleri son derece kıymetli' dedi. Emine Erdoğan , 16. Büyükelçiler Konferansı'na ilişkin, NSosyal hesabı üzerinden paylaşım yaptı. 'Barış, İstikrar ve Refah Üreten Dış Politika' temasıyla düzenlenen konferans kapsamında büyükelçiler ve eşleriyle bir araya gelmekten memnuniyet duyduklarını belirten Emine Erdoğan, "Bu anlamlı buluşma vesilesiyle, Sıfır Atık hareketinin dünyaya yayılan yolculuğunu ve ülkemizin COP31 sürecindeki güçlü vizyonunu yansıtan sergiyi ziyaret ettik. Türkiye'yi farklı coğrafyalarda temsil eden büyükelçilerimizin, Sıfır Atık hareketinin evrensel mesajını görev yaptıkları ülkelerde de yaygınlaştırma gayretleri son derece kıymetli. title: Members of a secretive California religious group have been charged with murder in 2 deaths
content: SAN BERNARDINO, Calif. (AP) — Members of a secretive California religious group have been charged with murder in the deaths of a man who disappeared in 2023 and a child who died in 2010. Shelley “Kat” Martin, 62, who was described as a leader of His Way Spirit Led Assemblies, was charged in the separate deaths of Emilio Ghanem, 40, whose pickup truck was found burned and abandoned in the Mojave Desert, and 4-year-old Timothy Thomas, known as Timo.

title: Israel blocks a Canadian delegation from visiting the occupied West Bank
content: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Israel on Tuesday blocked a private Canadian delegation that included six members of Parliament from entering the occupied West Bank . The Israeli Embassy in Canada said the group was denied entry because of its links to Islamic Relief Worldwide, a nongovernmental organization that Israel lists as a terror group.

title: Investigators release video timeline of the Brown campus shooting suspect's movements
content: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (AP) — Authorities on Tuesday released a new video timeline and a slightly clearer image of the man suspected in the Brown University shooting, though investigators provided no indication that they were any closer to zeroing in on his identity. Investigators have been canvassing Providence homes, yards and dumpsters in search of videos or other clues that might help them figure out who was behind Saturday's campus shooting, which killed two students and wounded nine others.

title: אחרי שנתניהו האשים אותו בהטרדה מינית - מני נפתלי מגיב: "הוא משקר, יש לו חסינות"
content: אחרי שנתניהו האשים אותו בהטרדה מינית - מני נפתלי מגיב: "הוא משקר, יש לו חסינות" מערכת וואלה חדשות עודכן לאחרונה: 16.12.2025 / 21:52 אחרי שראש הממשלה טען בעדותו כי נפתלי ניסה לאנוס עובדת במעון - אב הבית לשעבר הגיב שתף ב וואצאפ שתף ב פייסבוק שתף ב טוויטר שתף ב אימאייל שתף ב general ראש הממשלה בנימין נתניהו דורש מממשלות המערב להלחם באנטישמיות / לשכת ראש הממשלה מני נפתלי, לשעבר אב הבית במעון ראש הממשלה, דחה בחריפות את דבריו של בנימין נתניהו בעדותו היום (שלישי) בבית המשפט, שלפיהם נפתלי ניסה לאנוס עובדת במעון והמשטרה לא חקרה את המקרה. בראיון ל- 103FM אמר נפתלי כי מדובר בשקר וכי לנתניהו יש חסינות המאפשרת לו לומר כל דבר. "הוא יכול להשפיל כמה שהוא רוצה", אמר נפתלי. "אבל יצאתי מכל הבלאגן הזה, ואני רואה הכול מהצד". לדבריו, השיח הציבורי והפוליטי בישראל פוגע באחדות: "היינו יכולים להתאחד, הפוליטיקאים היו עושים את העבודה שלהם בכל המישורים וכל הסקטורים, אבל אנחנו רבים בינינו כל הזמן. אנחנו צריכים להיות במקום אחר לגמרי. אני מאמין בקדוש ברוך הוא - מה שצריך לקרות, קורה". כשנשאל כיצד הוא מגיב ברמה האישית לדברי נתניהו, השיב: "אני רק צוחק מזה". מני נפתלי בדיון בנושא תביעת הדיבה של מני נפתלי כנגד שורת מקורבי רה"מ, בית משפט השלום הרצליה, 2 בדצמבר 2019 / ראובן קסטרו בהמשך הוסיף: "הוא משקר, בטח הוא שיש לו חסינות, הוא יכול להגיד מה שהוא רוצה. תארו לכם שהייתי אומר את מה שאני רוצה, איזה כותרות הייתי עושה". נפתלי הדגיש כי בחר להתראיין ממניעים אחרים: "אני לא בטרלול הזה, עליתי לשידור רק כדי לאחד את העם ביום הקדוש הזה. אנחנו לקראת משיח לדעתי. אני אדם שומר מסורת ורואה הכול מהצד - עושים עוול לסקטור סקטור...

ARCTIC MX-7 Wärmeleitpaste im Test – Wird der Preisbrecher auch ein Eisbrecher in den Top 10 sein?
content: Die neue ARCTIC MX-7 ist eine konsequente Weiterentwicklung einer Pastenserie, die seit vielen Jahren in einem eher unauffälligen, aber technisch relevanten Segment den Markt prägt. ARCTIC konzentrierte sich schon früh darauf, unkomplizierte und dennoch reproduzierbare Lösungen für Anwender zu schaffen, die eine zuverlässige thermische Verbindung benötigen, ohne sich mit exotischen Formulierungen oder kurzlebigen Trends auseinandersetzen zu müssen. Genau aus diesem Grund weist die MX-Serie eine bemerkenswerte Kontinuität auf, die von der ersten weit verbreiteten Einführung des MX-2 bis zum heutigen MX-7 verfolgt werden kann. Die MX-2 vertrat damals den Ansatz, eine elektrisch nicht leitende Paste auf Silikonbasis mit feiner, gleichmäßiger Partikelverteilung anzubieten, bei der die Alterungsstabilität wichtiger war als die theoretisch höchste Wärmeleitfähigkeit. Der MX-4 folgte diesem Konzept, setzte jedoch auf eine noch stabilere Matrix und etablierte sich über viele Jahre als Allzwecklösung für Kühlerhersteller, Systemintegratoren und Anwender, die Wert auf einen wartungsarmen Betrieb legten. MX-5 und MX-6 markierten in der Folge einen Wandel hin zu moderneren Füllstoffen und veränderten rheologischen Eigenschaften, wobei insbesondere MX-6 deutlich zeigte, dass ARCTIC deutliche Verbesserungen im Bereich der Verarbeitungseigenschaften erzielen konnte. Beispiele für diesen Schritt waren die feinkörnigere Struktur, der homogenere Auftrag und die...

title: “Stranger Things”? Céu rosa em Curitiba chama a atenção ao entardecer. Entenda o fenômeno
content: Curitiba registrou um incrível fenômeno visual no entardecer desta terça-feira (16 de dezembro), num cenário que lembrou a série “Stranger Things”. É que o céu da capital paranaense ficou rosa no final do dia de hoje, num espetáculo natural flagrado pelo jornalista João Frigério. E que pode ter causas diversas. Há alguns anos, em janeiro de 2022, cidades do Rio de Janeiro, da Bahia, de Minas Gerais e do Mato Grosso também presenciaram o fenômeno. Na época, inclusive, o Pão de Açúcar, um dos principais cartões postais cariocas, chegou a ficar com o céu “pintado”. E o fenômeno foi causado pela erupção de um vulcão submarino, que devastou o arquipélago de Tonga, no Oceano Pacífico. A mudança de cor no céu, então, ocorreu devido às partículas de sulfato que se originaram do vulcão. No caso de Curitiba, entretanto, o fenômeno visual mais recente deve ter outras causas. O espetáculo natural é causado pela dispersão da luz solar na atmosfera, sendo mais comum ao nascer e ao pôr do sol. No caso curitibano, foi justamente ao entardecer que o céu ficou rosado, num tom que encantou e, ao mesmo tempo, também apavorou internautas (veja mais detalhes logo abaixo). Situações como poluição e poeira, além das já citadas partículas de erupções vulcânicas e a posição do Sol, podem intensificar o efeito visual. No caso do amanhecer e do entardecer, isso ocorre porque, devido à posição do Sol, a luz atravessa uma camada mais espessa da...

title: Neuer Mozilla-Chef: „Wir müssen es mit Big Tech aufnehmen“
content: Herr Enzor-DeMeo, im Browsermarkt ist derzeit viel Bewegung. KI-Unternehmen wie Open AI und Perplexity veröffentlichen ihre eigenen Browser. Was bedeutet das für Mozilla und seinen Firefox-Browser?Richtig, das Interesse an Browsern ist derzeit enorm, nachdem sich auf dem Markt zehn bis fünfzehn Jahre lang kaum etwas getan hat. Ich denke, Wettbewerb ist eine gute Sache, und Mozilla verfolgt einen anderen Ansatz als andere. Wir entwickeln beispielsweise keine eigenen Sprachmodelle. Wir gehören einer gemeinnützigen Stiftung an und verfügen nicht wie manche Mitbewerber über große Milliardensummen. Ich halte es aber für einen strategischen Vorteil, ein kleiner und unabhängiger Anbieter zu sein. Dies zwingt uns, uns auf das zu konzentrieren, was die Benutzer wirklich wollen. Manche Menschen wollen KI nicht oder nur in bestimmten Fällen nutzen. Deshalb möchten wir Ihnen beispielsweise ermöglichen, KI-Funktionen im Firefox-Browser ein- und auszuschalten.Einige Ihrer Benutzer haben Ihnen also mitgeteilt, dass sie keine KI-Funktionen wünschen? Ja, wir haben entsprechende Umfragen durchgeführt. Zwölf Prozent der Befragten gaben an, KI generell nicht nutzen zu wollen, 40 Prozent wollten sie nicht im Browser nutzen. 60 Prozent gaben an, dass sie sich bei der Nutzung von KI-Diensten Sorgen um ihre Privatsphäre machen.Woher kommt das plötzliche Interesse am Browsermarkt? Als Gateway zum Internet sind Browser natürlich sehr wichtig. KI hat plötzlich die Art und Weise...
creator: adelheid adelheid

title: Ford stoppt Elektrofahrzeuge, was Milliarden kostet
content: Ford passt seine Strategie an das politische Umfeld und die Marktnachfrage an. Der Autokonzern steigt aus dem Geschäft mit Großfahrzeugen mit rein elektrischem Antrieb aus. Ford war auf Dauer nicht in der Lage, die Verluste zu verkraften. Gewinne verspricht sich das Management von einem Pick-up-Truck mit seriellem Hybridantrieb und von einem völlig neuen Geschäftsbereich: großen Energiespeichern für Stromnetze und Rechenzentren. Lesen Sie mehr nach der Anzeige Der letzte, rein elektrische Pick-up F150 Lightning ist bereits vom Band gelaufen. Es war nicht profitabel, obwohl es der meistverkaufte Elektro-Pickup in Nordamerika war. Ein ursprünglich für 2025 geplantes Elektro-SUV mit drei Sitzreihen wurde im vergangenen Jahr eingestellt. Stattdessen sollen zwei elektrische Lieferwagen erscheinen, einer für Nordamerika, einer für Europa. Beide Projekte wurden inzwischen abgebrochen. Es bestand wohl keine Aussicht auf Gewinne. Im Oktober hat auch General Motors seinen elektrischen Lieferwagen vom Markt genommen. Der Rückzug wird Ford teuer zu stehen kommen: Er wird in den nächsten zwei Jahren 5,5 Milliarden US-Dollar kosten. Darüber hinaus sind bereits getätigte Investitionen in Vermögenswerte wertlos, was zu Abschreibungen in Höhe von 19,5 Milliarden US-Dollar führt, der Großteil davon im laufenden Quartal. 2030: 50 Prozent reine Verbrennungsmotoren Die neue Strategie sieht vor, dass bis 2030 die Hälfte aller verkauften Neufahrzeuge von Ford reine Verbrenner sein...

title: Newly promoted Ole Miss coach Pete Golding seeking stability as CFP opener vs. Tulane looms
content: OXFORD, Miss. (AP) — As Pete Golding prepares to make his head-coaching debut for Ole Miss in a high-stakes College Football Playoff game, he’s pushing the message that the Rebels are "focused on the mission, not the man.” That “man” is former coach Lane Kiffin, the brazen architect of the Rebels' dynamic, high-octane offense.

title: Christensen and Rashford give Barcelona win over 3rd-tier club Guadalajara in Copa del Rey
content: MADRID (AP) — Barcelona needed late goals by Andreas Christensen and Marcus Rashford to defeat third-division club Guadalajara 2-0 on Tuesday in the round of 32 of the Copa del Rey in a game delayed because of problems with the stadium's temporary grandstand. Kickoff was delayed by half an hour because local authorities did not initially allow fans access to the newly built grandstand at the Pedro Escartín stadium in the city of Guadalajara near Madrid.

title: Colleague at Milwaukee judge's trial says she was 'shocked' at her actions
content: MILWAUKEE (AP) — A colleague of the Milwaukee judge accused of helping a Mexican immigrant evade arrest testified Tuesday that she was shocked by her fellow judge's behavior. “Judges shouldn’t help defendants evade arrest,” Milwaukee County Circuit Judge Kristela Cervera testified at Hannah Dugan's trial.

title: Worthington Enterprises Posts Q2 Sales Growth
Worthington Enterprises Posts Q2 Sales Growth
content: (RTTNews) - Worthington Enterprises, Inc. (WOR) on Tuesday reported second-quarter fiscal 2026 results for the period ended November 30, 2025. The company reported a net income of $27 million or $0.55 per share, a slight decrease from $28 million or $0.56 per share during the same quarter last year. The adjusted net income increased 7 percent to $32.5 million or $0.65 per share, an increase from $30.2 million or $0.60 per share last year. Adjusted EBITDA grew 8 percent to $60.5 million. Net sales rose 19 percent to $327.5 million from $274.0 million in the same quarter last year, driven by higher volumes in the Building Products segment, including contributions from Elgen Manufacturing, which was acquired in June 2025. Operating income increased to $12.3 million, reflecting improved volumes in Building Products, compared with $3.5 million in the prior-year quarter. WOR closed Tuesday at $56.29, down 2.51%, and traded after hours at $51.49, down 8.53% on the NYSE. title: Galatasaray yenilgisi Erol Bulut'un sonunu getirdi
content: Emre Belözoğlu'nun ardından teknik direktörlük görevine Erol Bulut 'u getiren Antalyaspor yönetimi, deneyimli hoca ile ilgili radikal bir karar almaya hazırlanıyor. GALATASARAY MAĞLUBİYETİ SONUNU GETİRDİ Ajansspor'un haberine göre; Antalyaspor yönetimi, Galatasaray 'a karşı alınan 4-1'lik yenilgi sonrası Erol Bulut ile yollarını ayırmak için görüşmelere başladı. Akdeniz ekibinin, 50 yaşındaki çalıştırıcı ile ligin 14. haftasında alınan Göztepe mağlubiyetinden sonra da yollarını ayırmayı düşündüğü ama gerçekleşen yönetim kurulu toplantısının ardından yola devam kararı alındığı belirtildi. 8 MAÇTA 1 GALİBİYET Erol Bulut yönetiminde Süper Lig'de 8 mücadeleye çıkan Antalyaspor bu karşılaşmalarda sadece ikas Eyüpspor'u yenebildi. Deneyimli hocanın akıbetinin kısa süre içerisinde belli olması bekleniyor.
creator: son dakika

title: Maryland to consider slavery reparations after Gov. Wes Moore's veto is overridden
content: ANNAPOLIS, Md. (AP) — Maryland will create a commission to study potential reparations for slavery after lawmakers voted Tuesday to override a veto by Gov. Wes Moore — currently the nation's only Black governor — that disappointed many fellow Democrats. Moore said in his veto letter in May that it was a difficult decision to veto the bill, which was a priority of the Legislative Black Caucus of Maryland. But he wrote there has been enough study of the legacy of slavery, and it was now time to “focus on the work itself" to address it.
creator: brian witte - associated press

title: Off-duty Customs and Border Protection officer fires gun in dispute with driver at JFK airport
content: NEW YORK (AP) — An off-duty Customs and Border Protection officer fired his gun several times during a confrontation with another motorist Tuesday on an access road for New York’s Kennedy Airport, police said. The CBP officer told authorities that he pulled his weapon after the other driver attacked him over a minor traffic crash, Port Authority police said.

title: Van tres robos a comercios en lo que va de diciembre; CANACO llama a denunciar - El Mercurio de Tamaulipas
content: La Cámara Nacional de Comercio (CANACO) en Ciudad Victoria hizo un llamado a los propietarios de establecimientos comerciales a denunciar los robos, aun cuando se trate de incidentes menores, para que exista un registro oficial que permita identificar zonas de riesgo y reforzar las acciones de seguridad. Este llamado surge luego de que en fechas recientes se registrara un robo a un establecimiento ubicado sobre la calle Hidalgo, el cual no fue denunciado ante las autoridades, lo que impidió generar un antecedente estadístico y dar seguimiento al caso. El presidente del organismo, Federico González Sánchez, explicó que la denuncia es fundamental para que los hechos puedan ser atendidos de manera formal. “Era importante que se reportara para que pudiéramos ayudarle a realizar la denuncia y que exista un registro. Si no se denuncia, no aparece en las estadísticas y no se puede dar seguimiento”, señaló. Indicó que Canaco puede apoyar a los comerciantes en la coordinación del proceso, incluso para presentar denuncias en línea, y canalizar los casos a las mesas de seguridad locales y estatales. “Si se acercan a la cámara, nosotros los apoyamos para hacer la denuncia, aunque sea en línea, para que quede un registro y, si se vuelve recurrente, poder platicarlo con las autoridades”, añadió. Durante la actual temporada navideña, González Sánchez informó que se han registrado alrededor de tres robos a establecimientos de distintos giros, con pérdidas económicas...

title: US Capitol unveils statue of teen civil rights icon Barbara Rose Johns, taking Robert E. Lee's spot
content: The U.S. Capitol on Tuesday began displaying a statue of a teenaged Barbara Rose Johns as she protested poor conditions at her segregated Virginia high school, a pointed replacement for a statue of Confederate Gen. Robert E. Lee that was removed several years ago . An unveiling ceremony of the statue representing Virginia in the Capitol was taking place in Emancipation Hall, featuring Republican House Speaker Mike Johnson, Democratic Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Republican Virginia Gov. Glenn Youngkin and Virginia's congressional delegation.

title: Call-ups continue to affect Utica Comets in 2025-26
content: UTICA — The New Jersey Devils are plagued by injury woes and the Utica Comets continue to be affected. It is a trickle down effect as the Comets serve as the American Hockey League affiliate to New Jersey and call-ups are expected, though this season has felt busier than usual. The latest move came Tuesday as New Jersey announced the recall of energy winger Nathan Légaré. He was needed with rookie Artseny Gritsyuk recently out of the lineup. To make room on the Devils’ 23-man roster, the NHL club moved former Comets defenseman and standout Šimon Nemec to the injured reserve on Tuesday. With Légaré’s call-up to New Jersey, he joins: Xavier Parent Angus Crookshank Colton White Calen Addison Through last Saturday’s loss to Springfield, the Comets had 46 man-games lost to NHL call-ups. Utica has played 23 games. The Devils have their own troubles as they are without: Jack Hughes Evgenii Dadonov Zack MacEwen Timo Meier (personal matter) Johnathan Kovacevic Brett Pesce (expected to play this week, according to reports) Marc McLaughlin (who has yet to play this season due to an undisclosed injury, though briefly skated with New Jersey on Tuesday). The 24-year-old Légaré plays a gritty, physical style and has already played in four NHL games with New Jersey. “You look at XP (Xavier Parent) was pretty good with us in Utica and I think he deserved that callup,” Légaré told the Devils website Tuesday. “I watched all the games that he’s been here, and I think he’s been good,...

title: Thai Interest Rate Decision Due On Wednesday
content: (RTTNews) - The central bank in Thailand is scheduled to conclude its monetary policy meeting on Wednesday and then announce its decision on interest rates, highlighting a modest day for Asia-Pacific economic activity. The central bank is widely expected to lower its benchmark lending rate by 25 basis points, to 1.25 percent from 1.50 percent. The central bank in Indonesia is also set to conclude its monetary policy meeting and announce its decision on rates; its benchmark lending rate (4.75 percent), deposit facility rate (3.75 percent) and lending facility rate (5.50 percent) all are seen unchanged. Japan will release October figures for core machinery orders and November numbers for imports, exports and trade balance. In September, machinery orders were up 4.2 percent on month and 11.6 percent on year. In October, imports were up 0.7 percent on year and exports rose 3.6 percent for a trade deficit of 226.1 billion yen. Singapore will provide November data for non-oil domestic exports; in October, NODX was up 9.3 percent on month and 22.2 percent on year for a trade surplus of SGD7.249 billion. Lidar und eigene Chips: Rivian-Strategie sorgt für Analystenskepsis
content: Der zentrale Unterschied in der Autonomie-Entwicklung von Rivian und Tesla liegt in der Sensorik. Tesla verfolgt seit Jahren die von CEO Elon Musk propagierte Vision-Only-Strategie, die ausschliesslich auf Kameras und neuronale Netze setzt. Musk hat Lidar-Sensoren, die mit Laserstrahlen die Umgebung abtasten, wiederholt als "Krücke" bezeichnet. Rivian hingegen setzt auf eine Kombination aus Sensoren: Das kommende Modell R2, das ab Ende 2026 ausgeliefert werden soll, wird über elf Kameras, fünf Radar-Sensoren und einen nach vorne gerichteten Lidar-Sensor verfügen. Rivian-Manager betonen laut dpa, dass Lidar-Sensoren, ähnlich wie sie von der Google -Schwesterfirma Waymo genutzt werden, entscheidend für die Sicherheit seien, da Kameras bei extrem hellem oder schwachem Licht sowie bei Nebel an ihre Grenzen stossen könnten. Auf dem Autonomy & AI Day in Palo Alto präsentierte Rivian vergangene Woche eine klare Roadmap. Kernstück ist der selbst entwickelte 5-nm-Chip Rivian Autonomy Processor (RAP1) und das darauf basierende Autonomy Compute Module 3 (ACM3) mit 1600 sparse TOPS Rechenleistung. Dieser in-house entwickelte Ansatz ähnelt dem von Tesla. CEO RJ Scaringe skizzierte in der entsprechenden Pressemitteilung die schrittweise Einführung der Autonomiefunktionen. Der erste Schritt, Universal Hands-Free (UHF), wird ab Anfang 2026 für Gen 2 R1-Fahrzeuge verfügbar sein und freihändiges Fahren auf über 3,5 Millionen Meilen von Strassen in Nordamerika ermöglichen. title: Federal judge says he's inclined to deny preservationists' request to halt Trump's ballroom project
content: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge said Tuesday he's leaning toward denying a preservationist group's request to temporarily halt President Donald Trump's White House ballroom project, saying the organization failed to show that “irreparable harm” would be caused if the project moves forward. U.S. District Judge Richard J. Leon said he expects to issue his decision within a day.

title: Chelsea reaches English League Cup semifinals as subs make difference in win over 3rd-tier Cardiff
content: Chelsea’s substitutes made the difference Tuesday as wingers Alejandro Garnacho and Pedro Neto scored second-half goals to secure a 3-1 win at third-tier Cardiff City and a place in the English League Cup semifinals. Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca started with a largely second-string lineup for the first quarterfinal, but needed some of his first-team stars to avoid an upset in south Wales.

title: Jasrotia inaugurates Rs 11 lakh playground at Juthana
content: Excelsior CorrespondentKATHUA, Dec 16: Jasrota MLA and BJP leader, Rajiv Jasrotia today inaugurated a newly constructed playground at Juthana, developed at a cost of Rs11 lakh, marking a significant milestone in the strengthening of sports and recreational infrastructure in the rural belt of the constituency. The village, which earlier had no proper playground, has now been equipped with a dedicated space for sports, fitness, and community activities, bringing immense relief and joy to the youth, children, and adults alike.Addressing a well-attended public gathering, MLA Rajiv Jasrotia highlighted the importance of sports facilities in shaping a healthy, disciplined, and confident generation. He said that playgrounds are not merely spaces for games, but vital platforms for nurturing teamwork, leadership, and social harmony. Emphasizing the role of sports in keeping youth away from negative influences, he stated that such initiatives help channel youthful energy in a constructive direction and promote physical and mental well-being in rural communities.The MLA underlined that the BJP-led Government is committed to balanced and inclusive development, ensuring that villages which remained neglected for decades are now receiving focused attention. He said the playground at Juthana stands as a reflection of the Government’s vision of “development for all”, where every village is provided with essential amenities on par with urban areas.Reiterating his commitment to overall...

title: Jets release wide receiver Allen Lazard after nearly 3 disappointing seasons
content: Allen Lazard came to the New York Jets with a big contract and high expectations. He's leaving after almost three disappointing seasons. The Jets released the veteran wide receiver on Tuesday, cutting ties with Lazard after his role diminished significantly this season even as the offense struggled to produce. With three games left in the regular season, the 30-year-old will be able to sign elsewhere.

title: SBU plans new security measures for Reilly Center events
content: ST. BONAVENTURE — St. Bonaventure University will implement new security measures for major events at Reilly Center, beginning with Saturday’s men’s basketball game against Le Moyne.Additional staff will be on hand and signs visible to guide fans through updated entry lanes.The enhancements are part of the university's continued commitment to ensuring a safe and enjoyable experience for students, fans and the community, said Bob Beretta, vice president and director for intercollegiate athletics.The Evolv Express Gen2 system will provide advanced entry screening at the main public entrance to the arena, the hallway leading from the SBU Bookstore and ticket office. Evolv Express uses advanced sensor technology and AI to detect concealed threats. Other metal detectors will be utilized at less trafficked entrances, SBU officials noted.The Evolv system is designed to screen visitors effectively while helping minimize congestion and disruptions to traffic flow. This enhancement allows attendees to pass through security quickly and efficiently while maintaining the highest standards of public safety.“Fan safety is our top priority,” Beretta said. “By introducing this advanced screening technology, we’re taking proactive steps to protect our community and provide peace of mind to everyone attending our events.”The Evolv detection system has already been implemented successfully at major sports venues across the country. It identifies potential threats in real time, alerting trained...

title: DC says Admn on job to find cause, SKUAST team visits shrine
content: Fish die in holy springs of MattanExcelsior CorrespondentANANTNAG, Dec 16: A sizable number of fish in the holy springs of Martand (Mattan) in Anantnag district of Kashmir Valley and its downstream have died over last one week creating a wave of shock among the devotees.According to sources, soon after receiving the information from the president of Martand Tirath Trust, Ashok Sidha over the death of fish in the holy springs of Martand in Anantnag district of Kashmir Valley a team of Fisheries Department on the directives of District Development Commissioner, Anantnag, Syed Fakhrudin Hamid rushed to Mattan to find the sudden cause of the death of fish in the holy springs.The team examined the fish and administered the medicines but the disease could not be controlled and cause of the disease has not been ascertained so far. However, the Fisheries Department is on the job and has taken the samples of the fish as well as water on the directives of DC Anantnag who officials said is personally monitoring the situation.The officials said probably it is a fungal infection which mostly takes place in this season but without proper investigation it will be premature to reach on any conclusion.Officials said to ascertain the cause, the Fisheries Department approached the Dean of Fisheries Department SKUAST, Kashmir on the directives of DC Anantnag and a team of scientists and Microbiologists visited the holy shrine today along with the officials of Fisheries Department from Anantnag....

title: AP Sports SummaryBrief at 5:26 p.m. EST
content: FIFA slashes price of some World Cup tickets to $60 after global fan backlash GENEVA (AP) — FIFA slashed the price of some World Cup tickets for teams’ most loyal fans following a global backlash and some will get $60 seats for the final instead of being asked to pay $4,185. FIFA said Tuesday that some $60 tickets will be made available for every game at the tournament in North America, going to the national federations whose teams are playing. Those federations decide how to distribute them to loyal fans who have attended previous games at home and on the road. Fans worldwide reacted with shock and anger last week on seeing FIFA’s ticketing plans that gave participating teams no tickets in the lowest-priced category.

title: Former NIH scientist sues Trump administration, claims illegal firing over research cuts
content: WASHINGTON (AP) — A former leading scientist at the National Institutes of Health sued the Trump administration Tuesday, saying she was illegally fired for warning that abrupt research cuts were endangering patients and public health. The NIH has cut billions of dollars in research projects since President Donald Trump took office in January, bypassing the usual scientific funding process. The cuts included clinical trials testing treatments for cancer, brain diseases and other health problems that a recent report said impacted over 74,000 people enrolled in the experiments.
creator: lauran neergaard - ap medical writer

title: Controller Legal Metrology holds meetings with industry, oil companies
content: Excelsior CorrespondentJAMMU, Dec 16: Shiv Kumar Gupta, Controller, Legal Metrology, Jammu & Kashmir, held important engagements today, reaffirming the department’s proactive, facilitative, and consumer-centric approach.These engagements included an interaction with the Bari Brahmana Industries Association (BBIA) and a high-level review meeting with Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs).During the meeting with a delegation of BBIA, led by its President Lalit Mahajan, the delegation highlighted the need for simpler procedures, improved inter-departmental coordination, and enhanced awareness of Legal Metrology provisions to ensure smooth, transparent, and hassle-free compliance by industrial units.Responding constructively, the Controller assured that district officers of the Legal Metrology Department would organize quarterly awareness camps for industrial stakeholders. These camps will focus on briefing industries about updated provisions of the Legal Metrology Act, relevant Rules, and the Packaged Commodities Rules, with special emphasis on correct declarations, enrolment procedures, and statutory obligations. He advised industries to strictly adhere to prescribed norms, emphasizing that compliance is not a constraint but a safeguard for both businesses and consumers.In a separate review meeting, the Controller assessed the functioning, compliance standards, and consumer-oriented practices of Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs).The meeting was attended by departmental officers led by...

title: AP Business SummaryBrief at 5:24 p.m. EST
content: The US gained 64,000 jobs in November but lost 105,000 in October; unemployment rate at 4.6% WASHINGTON (AP) — The United States gained a decent 64,000 jobs in November but lost 105,000 in October as federal workers departed after cutbacks by the Trump administration, the government said in delayed reports. The unemployment rate rose to 4.6%, highest since 2021. Both the October and November job creation numbers, released Tuesday by the Labor Department, came in late because of the 43-day federal government shutdown. Hiring has clearly lost momentum, hobbled by uncertainty over President Donald Trump’s tariffs and the lingering effects of the high interest rates the Federal Reserve engineered in 2022 and 2023 to rein in an outburst of inflation. US tariffs are having an uneven effect on holiday prices and purchases NEW YORK (AP) — Many U.S. consumers say they’ve noticed higher than usual prices for holiday gifts in recent months, according to a a December poll from The Associated Press-NORC Center for Public Affairs Research. A contributing factor is the unusually high import taxes the Trump administration put on foreign goods. While the worst-case consumer impact that many economists foresaw from the administration’s trade policies hasn’t materialized, some popular gift items have been affected more than others. Most toys and electronics sold in the U.S. come from China. So do most holiday decorations. Jewelry prices have risen due to the cost of gold. Retail sales...

title: Grief engulfs Rajouri village as local JCO martyred in Kupwara
content: Excelsior CorrespondentRAJOURI, Dec 16: Grief engulfed Rattal village in district Rajouri today as local villager, serving in Army as JCO, was martyred in an explosion, near the Line of Control in Kupwara sector of Kashmir.A pall of gloom descended Rattal village in Choudhary Nad area of Rajouri as the news of martyrdom of Naib Subedar, Zabir Ahmed, reached the family. The neighbours started gathering at soldier’s house to know about the matter. They were shell shocked to know that JCO Zabir Ahmed attained martyrdom in an explosion while on duty along the Line of Control (LoC) in Kupwara district of the Kashmir Valley.The martyr had been serving the nation with exemplary dedication for the past 22 years and was presently deployed in the sensitive LoC sector of Kupwara, where the tragic incident occurred.Naib Subedar Zabir Ahmed is survived by his wife, two sons, a daughter, and his elderly mother. Following this sad news a steady stream of people started visiting the bereaved family to offer condolences and pay homage to the brave soldier. The entire area was engulfed in an atmosphere of sorrow, with villagers remembering the martyr with tearful eyes and deep respect.Recalling his brother’s devotion to duty, the martyr’s brother Farooq said that Zabir Ahmed had devoted most of his life to the service of the nation and rarely took leave to visit home, preferring to remain at the frontlines. He said the sudden loss has left the family and the entire village in deep shock and...

title: SIR is not new, Congress misleading people: Gaurav
content: Excelsior CorrespondentJAMMU, Dec 16: BJP State spokesperson and convener International Affairs, Gaurav Gupta on Monday said that the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls is neither new nor unconstitutional, asserting that the exercise has been carried out repeatedly since 1952 under successive governments, including those led by the Congress.Speaking at a SIR awareness workshop organised at the BJP district Jammu office under the chairmanship of district president, Rajesh Gupta, Gaurav Gupta, who was the main speaker said the opposition was deliberately spreading misinformation to create fear among voters.Gupta said SIR exercises were conducted during the tenures of Jawaharlal Nehru (1952, 1957, 1961), Lal Bahadur Shastri (1965-66), Indira Gandhi (1981-84), Rajiv Gandhi (1987-89), P.V. Narasimha Rao (1992-93-95), Atal Bihari Vajpayee (2002-03) and Dr Manmohan Singh (2004). “Now in 2025 under Prime Minister, Narendra Modi, the same democratic process is continuing,” he said.Explaining the purpose of SIR, Gupta said it aims to detect, delete and deport illegal names from electoral rolls. “Bangladeshi, Burmese and Rohingya infiltrators have no right to vote. India’s Prime Minister and Chief Ministers must be elected by Indian citizens, not by infiltrators,” he asserted, adding that SIR ensures purification of voter lists.Gupta accused the Congress of attempting to “normalize illegality” for electoral gains. “Congress could not win votes of the people, so now it...

title: Governo anuncia R$ 60 milhões em obras e investimentos em Umuarama; veja o que vai mudar
content: O governador do Paraná, Carlos Massa Ratinho Junior, cumpre agenda em Umuarama nesta quarta-feira (17), onde será recebido pelo prefeito Fernando Scanavaca para a inauguração de obras e o anúncio de novos investimentos em infraestrutura. As ações devem trazer impactos diretos para a cidade e também para toda a região Noroeste do Estado.A visita inclui encontros com lideranças regionais e a apresentação de projetos que atendem áreas estratégicas como mobilidade urbana, drenagem, educação e saúde.Duplicação da Estrada Bonfim vai melhorar fluxo de veículos pesadosUm dos principais anúncios do dia será a duplicação da Estrada Bonfim, antiga PR-482, hoje municipalizada. O investimento previsto é de R$ 20 milhões e contempla o trecho entre o trevo de saída para Maria Helena e a rodovia PR-323.Aumentam os registros de grandes felinos em municípios do Paraná; IAT emite alertaA via é fundamental para o tráfego de caminhões que transportam produtos vindos do Mato Grosso do Sul com destino à região de Maringá. A duplicação deve garantir mais segurança, agilidade e melhor conexão logística para Umuarama e cidades vizinhas.Obra de drenagem promete acabar com alagamentos na região centralOutro investimento de grande impacto é a implantação de um sistema de drenagem pluvial no entorno do Estádio Municipal Lúcio Pipino e do Bosque Uirapuru, na Zona III, com extensão até o Bosque dos Xetá. O projeto recebe R$ 16,5 milhões e tem como objetivo...

title: Five-day cyber crime investigation course begins at SKPA
content: Excelsior CorrespondentUDHAMPUR, Dec 16: A five-day training course on “Investigation of Cyber Crime”, sponsored by the Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre (I4C), Ministry of Home Affairs, commenced today at the Sher-i-Kashmir Police Academy (SKPA), Udhampur.A statement said the course is being attended by 28 police officers of the J&K Police, ranging from the rank of Sub-Inspector to Senior Superintendent of Police.It said the programme aimed at enhancing the professional skills and technical knowledge of investigating officers in handling cybercrime and cyber fraud cases.“During the training, participants will be familiarized with emerging trends in cybercrime, relevant legal provisions, and effective counter-measures. The course will also provide hands-on training in cyber forensics, digital evidence handling, and standard operating procedures (SOPs) for cybercrime investigation,” the statement said.Chief Guest during the inaugural function, Rajinder Kumar Gupta, Deputy Director (Indoor Trainings), SKPA Udhampur, welcomed the participants and underlines the importance of specialized training to meet the growing challenges of cybercrime.The Deputy Director highlighted various forms of cyber offences, including cyber bullying, cyber stalking, online job frauds, phishing, malware attacks, cyber-squatting, crypto-jacking, and other technology-driven crimes.He stressed that the rapid growth of the digital ecosystem has posed new challenges for law enforcement agencies,...

title: Wrestling legend Mick Foley parts ways with WWE because of its 'close relationship' with Trump
content: LOS ANGELES — Professional wrestling legend Mick Foley announced Tuesday that he is "parting ways with WWE" because of the organization's ties with fellow WWE Hall of Fame inductee President Donald Trump. "While I have been concerned about WWE's close relationship with Donald Trump for several months — especially in light of his administration's ongoing cruel and inhumane treatment of immigrants (and pretty much anyone who "looks like an immigrant") — reading the President's incredibly cruel comments in the wake of Rob Reiner's death is the final straw for me," Foley, 60, wrote Tuesday on Instagram. "I no longer wish to represent a company that coddles a man so seemingly void of compassion as he marches our country towards autocracy. Last night, I informed @WWE talent relations that I would not be making any appearances for the company as long as this man remains in office. "Additionally, I will not be signing a new Legends deal when my current one expires in June." WWE did not immediately respond to a request for comment from The Times. Following the killings of Hollywood icon Reiner and wife Michele Singer Reiner , Trump wrote on social media that the couple died "reportedly due to the anger he caused others through his massive, unyielding, and incurable affliction with a mind crippling disease known as TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME." Trump added of Reiner, who had campaigned for liberal causes: "He was known to have driven people CRAZY by his raging obsession of President...

title: AIIMS Jammu conducts its 1st cochlear implant surgery
content: Excelsior CorrespondentJAMMU, Dec 16: All-India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Jammu has successfully conducted its first cochlear implant surgery, marking a significant step forward in the Institute’s commitment to developing advanced ENT and hearing-care services.The milestone procedure was performed under the leadership of Prof (Dr) Shakti Kumar Gupta, Executive Director and CEO, AIIMS Jammu.The surgery was carried out by a skilled ENT team comprising Dr Darwin Kaushal (Additional Professor and Head), Dr Amardeep Singh (Associate Professor), Dr Youshita, Dr Gunjan, and Audiologist Nityansh Saluja, who worked in close coordination to ensure seamless surgical and audiological care.The team achieved this milestone under the mentorship and guidance of Prof (Dr) Rakesh Kumar, Head, Department of Otorhinolaryngology, AIIMS New Delhi.Equally instrumental was the expertise of the Anaesthesia team led by Dr Shruti Sharma, Dr Slomi Gupta, and Dr Bisma, who ensured safe and effective peri-operative management. The smooth conduct of the surgery was further supported by dedicated Senior Nursing Officers and Nursing Officers.With this achievement, the ENT Department at AIIMS Jammu has reached a defining milestone in its journey toward becoming a national centre of excellence for advanced ENT and hearing-care services.The successful procedure marks the beginning of a full-fledged cochlear implant service at AIIMS Jammu, offering renewed hope to children and adults with...

title: AP News Summary at 5:20 p.m. EST
content: Prosecutors charge Rob Reiner’s son Nick with 2 counts of murder in killing of his parents LOS ANGELES (AP) — Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner has been charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents. Los Angeles County District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced the charges against 32-year-old Nick Reiner at a news conference on Tuesday. The announcement of the charges came two days after the famed actor and director Rob Reiner and his wife, Michele Singer Reiner, were found dead in their Los Angeles home. Their son Nick Reiner was arrested hours later. Nick Reiner’s attorney Alan Jackson said medical reasons kept his client from making his first court appearance Tuesday.

title: Australian track and field Olympians Michelle Jenneke and Alex Beck announce engagement
content: Australian Olympic track athletes Michelle Jenneke and Alex Beck are engaged. They announced the engagement Sunday in a dual Instagram post. Jenneke added the message, “8.5 years in the making.” Jenneke, 32, competed in hurdles events for Australia at the 2016 Rio de Janeiro Games and the 2024 Paris Olympics. Beck, 33, qualified in the 400-meter run for Australia at the delayed 2020 Tokyo Olympics. AP sports: https://apnews.com/sports

title: Cluster University of Jammu wins Pride of Nation Award 2025
content: Excelsior CorrespondentJAMMU, Dec 16: Cluster University of Jammu won the National Pride of India Award for Institutions, during the function held today at the NDMC Convention Centre, Sansad Marg, New Delhi.The university was selected by a 5- member Jury led by retired Chief Justice of High Court, for Veterans India Pride of Nation Award 2025 in collaboration with National Board of Accreditation (NBA). The evaluation was based on the last one year achievements of the institutions on various parameters.Veterans India, established in 2015 stands as a national, apolitical, and patriotic organization dedicated to fostering nationalism and patriotism among citizens. The ‘Pride of Nation Award’ stands as a symbol of excellence and empowerment, celebrating universities and colleges which have made remarkable strides in their respective domains and continue to inspire others through their dedication, leadership, and service to the nation.The National Pride of India State Leadership Honour (University) Award was presented to Prof K S Chandrasekar, Vice Chancellor, Cluster University of Jammu by Dr T G Sitharam, Chairman- AICTE and Dr Anil Sahasrabuddhe, Chairman-NAAC & NBA in the presence of Sanjay Seth, Minister of State, Defence, Government of India on the Vijay Diwas. content: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Los Angeles prosecutors said Tuesday that Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner will be charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents, which stunned their communities in Hollywood and Democratic politics, where both were widely beloved. Nick Reiner, 32, is suspected in the deaths of the 78-year-old actor and director Rob Reiner and his wife Michele Singer Reiner , District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced at a news conference with LA Police Chief Jim McDonnell.

title: Prosecutors will charge Rob Reiner’s son Nick with 2 counts of murder in killing of his parents
content: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Los Angeles prosecutors said Tuesday that Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner will be charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents, which stunned their communities in Hollywood and Democratic politics, where both were widely beloved. Nick Reiner, 32, is suspected in the deaths of the 78-year-old actor and director Rob Reiner and his wife Michele Singer Reiner , District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced at a news conference with LA Police Chief Jim McDonnell. “Their loss is beyond tragic and we will commit ourselves to bringing their murderer to justice," Hochman said. Prosecutors plan to file the charges, two counts of first degree murder with a special circumstance of multiple murders, later Tuesday. They will also include a special allegation that he used a dangerous weapon, a knife. “This case is heartbreaking and deeply personal, not only for the Reiner family and their loved ones but for our entire city,” McDonnell said. “We will continue to support the Reiner family and ensure that every step forward is taken with care, dignity and resolve.” The announcement of the charges came two days after the couple was found dead from apparent stab wounds in their home in the upscale Brentwood neighborhood on the west side of Los Angeles. Nick Reiner did not resist when he was arrested hours later in the Exposition Park area near the University of Southern California, about 14 miles (22.5 kilometers) from the crime scene, police said....

title: iRobot Begins Bankruptcy Restructuring as Debt and Competition Mount
content: After decades of shaping the home robotics market, iRobot has entered Chapter 11 bankruptcy proceedings. The announcement marks a pivotal moment for the iconic Roomba maker, once synonymous with household automation. Throughout its journey, iRobot introduced millions to consumer robotics, but growing competition and financial setbacks have recently overshadowed its early achievements. As the company undertakes a significant restructuring plan, questions about the sustainability of celebrated tech brands in competitive markets grow more relevant than ever.Earlier reports highlighted iRobot’s expanding footprint, with strong home robot sales, defense contracts, and global brand recognition. Years ago, industry observers described a thriving company with robust sales, international acquisitions, and continuous product launches. However, recent years have seen notable setbacks, from increased market pressure by low-cost competitors, to regulatory barriers blocking major buyout deals. These developments paint a contrasting picture of a company once seen as unstoppable, now navigating survival strategies amidst changing market environments.What Led to iRobot’s Chapter 11 Filing?iRobot publicly confirmed it has started the Chapter 11 bankruptcy process, targeting completion by February 2026. The business attributes its current difficulties to declining revenue, limited access to new capital, and accumulated debt exceeding $350 million, much of it owed to key contract manufacturers....

title: Milliardenverluste für Shortseller: Turbulentes Jahr 2025 für die Tesla-Aktie
Tesla Stock Reaches Record High as Robotaxi Trials Expand
content: Tesla’s shares surged to an unprecedented close, riding a renewed investor appetite sparked by advancements in its autonomous vehicle projects. The company’s stock finished Tuesday at $489.88, an all-time high, after climbing over 3 percent during the day. This uptick follows a turbulent year that saw Tesla’s market value swing significantly, beginning with steep declines and culminating in a robust recovery since late April. Increased attention from the financial community was driven by recent developments in Tesla’s Robotaxi initiative in Austin, adding momentum to the rally. As the company’s valuation crossed $1.6 trillion, market participants observed keenly for further updates on its autonomous technologies.Tesla’s path to this valuation contrasts earlier years marked by slower stock growth and heavier reliance on electric vehicle sales rather than self-driving innovations. Investment sentiment typically responded to production milestones and regulatory shifts, especially surrounding tax credits for EV purchases. Regulatory uncertainty and leadership controversies impacted share performance in previous quarters, whereas the latest gains suggest a growing role for Tesla’s autonomous roadmap in influencing market behavior. News from Austin’s Robotaxi trials elevated expectations, corresponding with higher analyst price targets and projections for further autonomy-driven growth.What Triggered the Recent Stock Surge?The direct catalyst for this stock ascent was the...

title: Baba Reshi faces network issues
content: Excelsior CorrespondentSRINAGAR, Dec 16: Devotees and locals at the shrine of Baba Payamud Din Reshi in Baramulla district are facing persistent communication issues due to the lack of mobile network connectivity in the area.Locals said the problem is particularly severe with Jio services, causing inconvenience to devotees visiting from across Kashmir, as well as traders operating near the shrine.According to multiple accounts, mobile connectivity drops completely while approaching Baba Rashi, especially near the two-way crossing where one road leads to Gulmarg and the other to the shrine.The issue has reportedly persisted for several weeks, they said.“With no Jio signal at the site, we are unable to contact family members, arrange transportation, or access emergency services during our visit,” visitors said.Locals added that the disruption has also affected economic activity around the shrine.Shopkeepers, food vendors, and other service providers are unable to accept UPI and other digital payments, which have become the preferred mode of transaction.Given that a majority of mobile users in J&K rely on Jio services, the connectivity gap has intensified hardships for both devotees and the local population.Syed Adil, an RTI activist who experienced the network issue at the shrine, said he has raised the matter at his level, seeking intervention under the Government’s Digital India initiative.“I have been informed that the matter has now been forwarded to the Directorate...

title: I give delegates transport money – Bryan Acheampong
content: New Patriotic Party (NPP) presidential aspirant, Dr Bryan Acheampong, has defended providing delegates with transportation money during the party’s 2026 presidential primaries. Speaking on Asempa FM’s Ekosii Sen show, he said it is only right to give delegates transport funds when they travel several kilometres to attend meetings. Mr Acheampong emphasized that this practice is not vote buying, but a standard and widely accepted procedure. He dismissed claims that he is distributing money to influence votes.

title: Seltene Erden: Der Rohstoff, der Elektro- und Rüstungsindustrie antreibt
content: Seltene Erden sind Rohstoffe, deren Gewinnung und Aufbereitung langwierige Prozesse umfassen. Jedoch stellen sie einen der wichtigsten Bodenschätze für die moderne Zivilisation, Elektro- sowie Rüstungsindustrie dar. So finden Seltene Erden in nahezu jedem Lebensbereich Anwendung, sei es zur Verbesserung von Batterien, Bildschirmen, im Energiesektor - in Form von Teilen von Windturbinen - oder im medizintechnischen Bereich. Besonders von China besteht eine grosse Abhängigkeit, da das Land hauptsächlich die weltweite Versorgung mit diesen Rohstoffen kontrolliert, so ein Beitrag von DIE ZEIT.Deshalb wollen sich viele Länder von China lösen. Die EU und Südafrika haben im November 2025 ein Abkommen unterzeichnet, welches die Länder einen Schritt näher an die Unabhängigkeit von Chinas Rohstoffen bringen soll. Die EU-Kommissionspräsidentin Ursula von der Leyen sagte zu dem Abkommen bei ihrer Presserklärung in Johannesburg, dass man diese Rohstoffe brauche, um die Energiewende in Europa und Südafrika voranbringen zu können. Seltene Erden stellen einen wesentlichen Bestandteil für die Herstellung verschiedener Technologien für unterschiedliche Branchen dar. Laut eines Berichts auf br.de gehen jedoch gerade ihre Gewinnung und Entsorgung mit grossen Auswirkungen für die Umwelt einher.Das Recycling von Seltenen Erden ist noch keine etablierte Vorgehensweise. Massnahmen, die getroffen werden könnten, beinhalten laut all-electronics.de beispielsweise das Etablieren von...
