title: La UE da luz verde de nuevo a la contaminación de los coches de combustión
Mikaela Shiffrin's slalom domination reaching new heights during the Olympic season
content: COURCHEVEL, France (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin isn't just winning every slalom of the Olympic season . She's winning them by an average of more than 1.5 seconds — an eternity in ski racing. The American skiing standout claimed a record-extending 105th World Cup victory after several of her top challengers went out during a night race Tuesday.

title: Netflix boss promises Warner Bros films would still be seen in cinemas
content: Netflix will continue to distribute Warner Bros. films in cinemas if its takeover bid for the storied studio is successful, the streaming service's chief executive Ted Sarandos said in an interview Tuesday in Paris. "We're going to continue to operate Warner Bros. studios independently and release the movies traditionally in cinema," he said during an event in the French capital, while admitting his past comments on theatrical distribution "now confuse people". Previously, Sarandos had suggested that the cinema experience was outdated, surpassed by the convenience of streaming. The Netflix boss was being interviewed by Maxime Saada, head of France's Canal+ media group, in a Paris theatre that was presenting Canal+'s projects for 2026. Netflix only began to produce its own programmes a dozen years ago, Sarandos explained, so "our library only extends back a decade, where Warner Bros. extends back 100 years. So they know a lot about things that we haven't ever done, like theatrical distribution." In early December, Netflix announced that it had reached an agreement with Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) to acquire most of the group for $83 billion. However, doubts remain about whether the deal will be approved by regulators, and in the meantime television and film group Paramount Skydance has made a counter-offer valued at $108.4 billion. If Netflix's bid is successful, it would acquire HBO Max, one of the world's largest media platforms, and it would find itself at the head of a...
creator: afp afp

title: عيار 21 بكام النهاردة؟ سعر الذهب اليوم 16 ديسمبر 2025 في الصاغة
content: استقرت أسعار الذهب اليوم الثلاثاء على المستوي المحلي والعالمي حيث تراجع في بداية تعاملات اليوم بنحو 15 جنيها ثم ارتفع 10 جنيهات في التعاملات المسائية. يأتي ذلك في ظل حالة من الترقب تسود الأسواق انتظارًا لصدور بيانات اقتصادية أمريكية مهمة، من شأنها إعادة رسم توقعات السياسة النقدية للاحتياطي الفيدرالي خلال الفترة المقبلة وحتى عام 2026. وتميل الأسواق حاليًا إلى تبني سياسة الترقب والانتظار قبيل صدور البيانات، خاصة بعد تصريحات رئيس الاحتياطي الفيدرالي، جيروم باول، خلال الاجتماع الأخير للبنك المركزي، والتي أشار فيها إلى أن غالبية أعضاء لجنة السوق المفتوحة يرون أن مخاطر تباطؤ سوق العمل باتت تفوق مخاطر التضخم. سعر جرام الذهب عيار 12 اليوم 16 ديسمبر 2025 في الأسواق المصرية تعرف على سعر جرام الذهب اليوم الثلاثاء في مصر اسعار الذهب اليوم سعر الذهب عالميًا الآن سجل 4307 دولارات سعر الذهب عيار 18 سجّل سعر جرام الذهب عيار 18 اليوم 4929 جنيهًا للشراء. سعر الذهب عيار 21 سعر جرام الذهب عيار 21 الأكثر انتشارًا وصل إلى 5750 جنيهًا بدون مصنعية، وتتراوح أسعار المصنعية بين 3 و8% من سعر الجرام. سعر الذهب عيار 24 أما سعر الذهب عيار 24 الأعلى سعرًا، فسجّل 6571 جنيهًا. سعر الجنيه الذهب اليوم وسجل سعر الجنيه الذهب الآن في مصر 46 ألف جنيه. نشرة أسعار الذهب اليوم في مصر الثلاثاء 16 ديسمبر 2025 بالمصنعية كم سعر جرام الذهب اليوم في مصر؟.. أسعار الذهب الآن أسعار سبائك الذهب اليوم 16 ديسمبر 2025.. تحديث سعر سبائك BTC ننشر أسعار سبائك الذهب اليوم 16 ديسمبر 2025.. تحديث سعر سبائك BTC في محلات الصاغة المصرية الأسعار هي قيمة الذهب الخام في السبيكة، وتصل درجة نقائه إلى...
creator: جريدة الدستور

title: Tlaxcala llegará a 200 tiendas de Oxxo para 2026
content: En Tlaxcala se cuentan con 171 tiendas Oxxo y se espera llegar a 200, mientras que la inversión para el estado va desde los seis hasta los ocho millones por tiendaJavier Marroquín Calderón, titular de la Secretaría de Desarrollo Económico (SEDECO) resaltó que en 2026 se llegará a la tienda número 200 en la entidad, a fin de consolidar un modelo de negocio con el que se suma inversión a Tlaxcala. Esto, luego de inaugurar un Oxxo Nicho dentro de Ciudad Industrial Xicohténcatl No.2 en Huamantla;Marroquín Calderón señaló que el modelo de negocio de Oxxo es un gran logro para el estado, y en coordinación con Víctor Raúl Sanabria, Gerente de Plaza Oxxo en Tlaxcala, se acordó llegar a las 29 tiendas restantes en el próximo año, ya que hasta el momento, existen 171 inmuebles.En cuanto a la inversión, el titular de la SEDECO, la describió como “muy buena”, debido a que cada tienda Oxxo contempla una inversión promedio de 6 a 8 millones de pesos, a partir del tipo (Oxxo u Oxxo Nicho).“Esto modelo genera empleos formales, genera derrama, genera servicios y acercamos servicios a la ciudadanía en general”.Sumado a esto, recordó que en las tiendas Oxxo también se encuentran disponibles productos tlaxcaltecas, por lo que en todos los Oxxo del municipio de Tlaxcala se encuentran disponibles y se cuenta con un modelo escalable para abarcar un mayor mercado, tanto a nivel estatal como nacional.Destacó que hay productos que ya se venden en Puebla y otros que ya se...
creator: alexis palafox

title: شاهد الآن بث مباشر.. مباراة برشلونة وجوادالاخارا في كأس ملك إسبانيا
content: يبدأ نادي برشلونة حملة الدفاع عن لقبه في مسابقة كأس ملك إسبانيا بمواجهة نادي جوادالاخارا ضمن منافسات الدور الثالث (دور الـ32) من مسابقة كأس ملك إسبانيا موسم 2025 – 2026 على ملعب بيدرو إسكارتين. وكان برشلونة في الموسم الماضي قد نجح في التتويج باللقب بعد فوزه في المباراة النهائية على غريمة التقليدي نادي ريال مدريد بنتيجة 3 – 2. إذا كان برشلونة يستهل مشاركته في كأس ملك إسبانيا موسم 2025 – 2016 من دور الـ32، فإن جوادالاخارا قد بدأ مسيرته من الدور الأول، وفيه تجاوز نادي كاسيرينو بعد أن فاز عليه بنتيجة 2 – 1، وفي الدور الثاني تخطى نادي أتلتيكو سبتة بعد أن تغلب عليه بنتيجة هدف نظيف. قائمة برشلونة لمواجهة جوادالاخارا في كأس ملك إسبانيا موسم 2025 – 2026 أعلن الألماني هانز فليك المدير الفني لبرشلونة قائمة فريقه التي ستواجه جوادالاخارا ضمن منافسات دور الـ32 من كأس ملك إسبانيا 2025 – 2026 ضمت قائمة برشلونة 23 لاعبًا هم : حراسة المرمى: تير شتيجن – خوان جارسيا – تشيزني الدفاع: بالدي – كوبارسي – كريستنسن – جيرارد مارتين – كوندي – إيريك – جوفري خط الوسط: بيدري – فيرمين – مارك كاسادو – فرينكي دي يونج – برنال – درو – تومي الهجوم: فيران – ليفاندوفسكي – لامين يامال – رافينيا – راشفورد – روني الطاقم التحكيمي لمباراة برشلونة ضد جوادالاخارا في كأس ملك إسبانيا موسم 2025 – 2026 تعيين سوتو جرادو حكما لمباراة برشلونة ضد جوادالاخارا ضمن منافسات دور الـ32 من كأس ملك إسبانيا موسم 2025 – 2026. موعد مشاهدة مباراة برشلونة ضد جوادالاخارا في كأس ملك إسبانيا موسم 2025 – 2026 يمكن مشاهدة مباراة برشلونة ضد جوادالاخارا ضمن منافسات دور الـ32 من كأس ملك إسبانيا موسم 2025 – 2026...

title: Bill Fuller, Award-Winning Oregon Wine Pioneer and Visionary Winemaker, Celebrated for More Than 50 Years of Innovation, Passes Away at Age 88
content: Willamette Valley Vineyards Mourns the Passing of Longtime Consulting Winemaker SALEM HILLS, Ore. , Dec. 16, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Willamette Valley Vineyards is deeply saddened to share the passing of its consulting winemaker and longtime collaborator, Bill Fuller, whose legacy helped shape Oregon's wine industry. Bill passed away peacefully on December 14, 2025, at the age of 88. With more than 50 years of experience in the industry, Bill's impact spans generations of winemakers, iconic vineyard plantings and historic global recognition for Oregon wines. As an award-winning wine pioneer whose career shaped the future of cool-climate winemaking in the Pacific Northwest, Bill leaves an undeniable mark on the industry as a whole and those who had the pleasure of working with him. "We lost a great one – a great partner to his wife, Connie, a great friend, business partner, winemaker and Oregon wine industry pioneer," said Jim Bernau, Founder and President of Willamette Valley Vineyards. "Bill made wine and coached our team up until his passing at 88 years of age. The merger of his winery with ours in 1997 set us on the path of living our dreams together ever since. Please raise a glass of Oregon Pinot Noir in his honor." Bill moved from California to Oregon in 1973 with his family, vine cuttings and a bold vision for cool-climate Pinot Noir. At the time, he was the only practicing professional winemaker to make this leap. His background included lab work at Italian Swiss...

title: المتحدث باسم محافظة القدس: إسرائيل تسعى لفرض واقع جديد وبناء 9 آلاف وحدة استيطانية
content: قال معروف الرفاعي، المتحدث باسم محافظة القدس، إن هناك تقاعسًا دوليًا تجاه ما يحدث من جرائم في الأراضي المحتلة، مشيرًا إلى أن إسرائيل تسعى إلى فرض واقع جديد في الضفة الغربية والقدس المحتلة، عبر مشاريع استيطانية واسعة. وأضاف الرفاعي، خلال مداخلة عبر قناة " القاهرة الإخبارية "، أن الاحتلال يخطط لبناء 9 آلاف وحدة استيطانية في الضفة الغربية، في خطوة تهدف إلى تكريس السيطرة على الأرض الفلسطينية. وأوضح، أن الولايات المتحدة هي الجهة الوحيدة القادرة على وقف الانتهاكات الإسرائيلية في الضفة الغربية والقدس المحتلة، مؤكدًا ضرورة وجود تحرك دولي عاجل لوقف الجرائم والانتهاكات التي يرتكبها الاحتلال بحق الشعب الفلسطيني.
creator: جريدة الدستور

title: وزير الرياضة يدعم منتخب مصر في مباراة نيجيريا من المدرجات
content: كتب - يوسف محمد: حرص وزير الشباب والرياضة الدكتور أشرف صبحي، على دعم منتخب مصر في مباراة نيجيريا الودية، قبل خوض منافسات بطولة كأس أمم أفريقيا. ويلاقي منتخب مصر حاليا نظيره المنتخب النيجيري وديا، على ستاد "القاهرة الدولي"، في آخر تجارب الفراعنة الودية استعدادا لأمم أفريقيا 2025. وظهر وزير الشباب والرياضة خلال تواجده، في المقصورة الرئيسية لملعب "القاهرة الدولي"، رفقة هاني أبو ريدة رئيس الاتحاد المصري لكرة القدم، بالإضافة إلى خالد الدرندلي نائب رئيس الاتحاد المصري. وتتجه بعثة المنتخب الوطني إلى المغرب غدا الثلاثاء، إلى المغرب، استعدادا للمشاركة في بطولة كأس أمم أفريقيا 2025. ويذكر أن منتخب مصر يشارك في المجموعة الثانية ببطولة كأس أمم أفريقيا، رفقة كل من: "زيمبابوي، جنوب أفريقيا وأنجولا". أقرأ أيضًا: "12 مساهمة تهديفية".. لاعب مصري جديد يواصل التألق في إنجلترا "ذا بيست".. عثمان ديمبلي يتوج بجائزة أفضل لاعب في العالم لعام 2025
creator: مصراوي

title: יובל רפאל ארגנה הפתעה מושלמת לבן הזוג לחנוכה
content: חנוכה עמוס עובר על עידו מלכה ו יובל רפאל . הוא רץ בין הופעות הפסטיגל, היא בין במות משלה. אבל הערב הזה, הם הצליחו לרגע למצוא את נקודת המפגש. במהלך אחד המופעים שעלו היום, רפאל הפתיעה את מלכה מול קהל רב עם שיר, חיבוק והרבה שמחה ורגש. יובל רפאל ועידו מלכה, צילום: אינסטגרם הגיחה בהפתעה זה קרה באמצע קטע במופע הפסטיגל, כשעל הבמה עמדו עידו מלכה ו עדן גולן . קריין הקריא את הטקסט של המופע, כשלפתע הוכרז השם "יובל רפאל" , והיא הגיחה בהפתעה מתוך המתחם של "אחורי הקלעים". הירשמו לניוזלטר של ForReal ואנחנו נדאג שלא תפספסו שום דבר חשוב! בהרשמה, אני מאשר/ת את תנאי השימוש מלכה, שעמד במרכז הבמה, נראה מופתע לגמרי. הוא רץ לעברה, חיבק אותה ארוכות, ולא ניסה להסתיר את ההתרגשות. יובל רפאל באירוויזיון 2025, צילום: באדיבות EBU - צילום: Alma Bengtsson הנאמבר שייצג אותנו בכבוד רפאל ביצעה על הבמה את השיר "יום חדש יעלה" , השיר שאיתו ייצגה את ישראל באירוויזיון והגיעה למקום השני. מלכה נשאר לצידה לאורך הביצוע, בזמן שכולם מסביבה מגיבים במחיאות כפיים ממושכות. בסיום השיר עלו לבמה כל משתתפי הפסטיגל והקיפו את רפאל. היא חתמה את הרגע בקריאה קצרה לקהל: "חג שמח" . הכירו בריאליטי רפאל ומלכה הכירו במהלך התוכנית "הכוכב הבא לאירוויזיון" . מאז, השניים מנהלים זוגיות אוהבת, שהיום תועדה על הבמה הגדולה של חנוכה. יובל רפאל עם עידו מלכה, מאחורי הקלעים ב"הכוכב הבא, צילום: אינסטגרם טעינו? נתקן! אם מצאתם טעות בכתבה, נשמח שתשתפו אותנו
creator: ערן סויסה

title: نقيب الإعلاميين: إطلاق مشروع مشترك للإنتاج الإعلامي الرقمي بين النقابة والجامعة الأمريكية
content: قام نقيب الإعلاميين الدكتور طارق سعدة، بزيارة إلى الجامعة البريطانية بالقاهرة، وشهد نقيب الإعلاميين، اجتماع مجلس الكلية مناقشة عدد من الملفات المهمة، وفي مقدمتها لوائح الدراسات العليا، لا سيما ما يتعلق بالتحضير لإعداد لائحة درجة الدكتوراه، بما يسهم في تطوير المنظومة التعليمية والبحثية بكلية الإعلام، ورفع كفاءة البرامج الأكاديمية بما يتواكب مع التطورات المتسارعة في المجال الإعلامي، في إطار تعزيز التعاون الأكاديمي والمهني بين المؤسسات التعليمية والنقابية. وفي مستهل الزيارة رحب الدكتور عادل صالح، بزيارة النائب الدكتور طارق سعده، نقيب الإعلاميين، وخبير الإعلام الرقمي وتقنيات الذكاء الاصطناعي، مثمنًا انضمامه إلى عضوية مجلس الكلية، مؤكدًا علي أهمية الاستفادة من خبراته في دعم خطط تطوير التعليم الإعلامي داخل الجامعة. وعقب انتهاء الاجتماع، اصطحب الدكتور عادل صالح نقيب الإعلاميين في جولة تفقدية شملت الاستوديوهات والبنية التحتية الإعلامية التي تمتلكها كلية الإعلام بالجامعة البريطانية، التي تضم استوديوهات الإذاعة والتليفزيون والبودكاست، إلى جانب غرفة الأخبار المتخصصة. ومن جانبه، أثنى نقيب الإعلاميين، على مستوى الجاهزية والتجهيزات الفنية المتقدمة للاستوديوهات، مؤكدًا أنها أُسست وفق أعلى المعايير المهنية، بما يفتح المجال أمام إطلاق مشروع مشترك للإنتاج الإعلامي الرقمي بين نقابة الإعلاميين وكلية الإعلام بالجامعة البريطانية. ويهدف هذا المشروع إلى خلق آفاق جديدة وفرص عمل واعدة لشباب خريجي كلية الإعلام، لا سيما المتخصصين في مجال الإعلام الرقمي، الذي يمثل جوهر الإعلام المعاصر في الوقت الراهن. وفي السياق ذاته، رحّب الدكتور عادل صالح بهذه الشراكة، مؤكدًا...

title: Beeline Releases Analysis of October/November 2025 U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics Jobs Data with Focus on Extended and Independent Workforce
content: The extended workforce—contractors, independent professionals, SOW consultants, and project-based talent—underscores a fundamental shift: even when full-time payrolls cool, work itself does not slow JACKSONVILLE, Fla. , Dec. 16, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Following today's release of the October/November 2025 U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) Employment Situation report, Beeline , the leading technology solution provider for managing the global extended workforce, is sharing key indicators that reflect activity in the fastest-growing segment of the labor market: non-payroll workers. According to the delayed BLS jobs report , total nonfarm payroll employment decreased by 105,000 in October and increased by 64,000 in November . The unemployment rate rose to a four-year high of 4.6% in November. The BLS jobs report tracks full-time and part-time payroll jobs on employer payrolls. However, it does not measure the extended workforce—contractors, independent professionals, statement-of-work (SOW) consultants, and project-based talent—who increasingly power critical work across industries and operate outside the BLS methodology, today accounting for approximately 40% of the total U.S. workforce . Beeline's anonymized, aggregated data (from Oct. 1 – Nov. 30, 2025) shows that this segment of the labor market remains active and is expanding: These trends align with the broader rise of independent work. According to the 2025 MBO Partners State of Independence report , 72.9 million...

title: Free agent reliever Jason Foley agrees to $2M, one-year contract with Giants
content: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Free agent right-hander Jason Foley has agreed to a $2 million, one-year contract with the San Francisco Giants, who expect the reliever to return midseason following surgery on his pitching shoulder that cost him most of the 2025 campaign. The 30-year-old Foley, a former closer for Detroit, was designated for assignment last month by the Detroit Tigers.
creator: ap

title: Free agent reliever Jason Foley agrees to $2M, one-year contract with Giants
content: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Free agent right-hander Jason Foley has agreed to a $2 million, one-year contract with the San Francisco Giants, who expect the reliever to return midseason following surgery on his pitching shoulder that cost him most of the 2025 campaign. The 30-year-old Foley, a former closer for Detroit, was designated for assignment last month by the Detroit Tigers. He had shoulder surgery last May after leading the club with 28 saves in 2024. The procedure was performed by Dr. Keith Meister to repair his anterior capsule. Foley was optioned to Triple-A Toledo after spring training, a season after trailing just four AL pitchers in saves. Foley went on the injured list in April with a right shoulder strain and made only five appearances for Triple-A Toledo spanning 6 2/3 innings. He was 3-6 with a 3.15 ERA in 69 outings in 2024, tying Will Vest for the team lead, and had at least 20 more saves than any other Tigers pitcher. Over three-plus major league seasons, he is 7-9 with a 3.16 ERA, 35 saves and 150 strikeouts in 210 games. AP MLB: https://apnews.com/mlb

title: Sachsen-Anhalt: Landtag ruft erneut Corona-Notstand aus – Opposition reagiert mit Häme
content: Der Landtag von Sachsen-Anhalt hat erneut den Ausnahmezustand ausgerufen. Damit kann der sogenannte Corona-Sonderfonds auch im Jahr 2026 genutzt werden. Die Opposition spricht von echter Satire. Auch für das Jahr 2026 hat der Landtag von Sachsen-Anhalt eine außergewöhnliche Notlage festgestellt. Bei der namentlichen Abstimmung stimmten 51 Abgeordnete mit Ja und 31 mit Nein, wie Vizepräsident Wulf Gallert (Linke) mitteilte. 15 Abgeordnete waren nicht anwesend. Damit können auch im nächsten Jahr Projekte aus dem sogenannten Corona-Sondervermögen finanziert werden. Der kreditfinanzierte Sondertopf wurde eingerichtet, um die Folgen der Pandemie abzufedern und für die Zukunft vorzusorgen. Es umfasst rund 60 Maßnahmen. Das Volumen beträgt knapp zwei Milliarden Euro. Das bedeutet, dass Schulen und Universitäten neue Technologien anschaffen und in die Digitalisierung der Landesverwaltung und Krankenhäuser investieren. Finanzminister Michael Richter (CDU) sagte, die Notlage müsse festgestellt werden. CDU-Finanzpolitiker Stefan Ruland betonte, es gehe um die Zukunft des Landes. „Die Bewältigung einer solchen Krise endet nicht mit dem letzten Lockdown.“ Resilienz sei Teil des Krisenmanagements, sagte Ruland. „Pandemieresilienz ist kein kurzfristiges Projekt“ Dies haben auch die Koalitionspartner SPD und FDP anerkannt. „Pandemieresilienz ist kein kurzfristiges Projekt“, sagte der Abgeordnete Jörg Bernstein (FDP). Sein Fraktionskollege Konstantin Pott stimmte dennoch gegen...

title: "המראות והריח מחזירים אותנו ל-7 באוקטובר": זק"א בזירות הטבח בסידני
content: "עדות אילמת לטבח": משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני - בזירה הסגורה, בשיתוף פעולה מלא עם משטרת אוסטרליה. משלחת מתנדבי זק"א פועלת מאז שעות הערב (שלישי) בלב זירות הירי הקשות בסידני, לאחר שקיבלה אישור מיוחד להיכנס לזירה שעד כה הייתה סגורה לחלוטין, במסגרת שיתוף פעולה מקצועי עם משטרת סידני כוחות הביטחון המקומיים יחד עם חברי הקהילה היהודית המקומית. תיעוד של הפיגוע באוסטרליה עם הכניסה לזירה נחשפו מתנדבי זק"א למחזה קשה ומטלטל. זירה שנותרה כפי שהייתה מאז הפיגוע. הצוותים פעלו לריכוז כלל הממצאים והפריטים שנותרו במקום, והחלו בחרדת קודש באיסוף דם רב וממצאים המצריכים קבורה, במספר זירות ירי שונות. הפעילות מתבצעת תוך ליווי צמוד של משטרת סידני, אשר מגלה רגישות והבנה לחשיבות העליונה של איסוף כלל הממצאים וטיפול בכבוד המת על פי המסורת היהודית. מוקדם יותר נפגשה המשלחת עם קריסי בארט, מפכ"לית משטרת הפדרציה האוסטרלית, וטוני ברק, שר הפנים וביטחון הפנים של אוסטרליה, שהביעו זעזוע עמוק וחיזקה את ידי המתנדבים במלאכת הקודש. משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני , צילום: דוברות זק"א משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני , משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני , צילום: דוברות זק"א משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני , צילום: דוברות זק"א משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני , צילום: דוברות זק"א משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני , צילום: דוברות זק"א משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני , צילום: דוברות זק"א משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני , משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני , צילום: דוברות זק"א משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב זירות הירי בסידני , צילום: דוברות זק"א משלחת זק"א פועלת בלב...

title: Trio of Russian athletes barred from luge World Cup in Lake Placid amid neutrality concerns
content: The International Luge Federation has withdrawn the eligibility of three Russian athletes who intended to slide in Lake Placid, New York, this weekend in hopes of moving closer to qualifying for the Milan Cortina Olympics, the governing body announced Tuesday. The federation's executive board made the decision to remove Alexsandr Gorbatsevich, Sofiia Mazur and Kseniia Shamova from the list of eligible sliders after “new evidence” was presented and discussed with, among others, the International Olympic Committee.
creator: by tim reynolds - ap sports writer

title: Trio of Russian athletes barred from luge World Cup in Lake Placid amid neutrality concerns
content: The International Luge Federation has withdrawn the eligibility of three Russian athletes who intended to slide in Lake Placid, New York, this weekend in hopes of moving closer to qualifying for the Milan Cortina Olympics, the governing body announced Tuesday. The federation's executive board made the decision to remove Alexsandr Gorbatsevich, Sofiia Mazur and Kseniia Shamova from the list of eligible sliders after “new evidence” was presented and discussed with, among others, the International Olympic Committee. FIL officials did not reveal the nature of the evidence, but a person familiar with the situation said it called into question the neutrality of Gorbatsevich, Mazur and Shamova regarding Russia's invasion of Ukraine in 2022. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because that detail was not released publicly. The neutrality issue is paramount in the process of determining which Russian athletes will be allowed to even have a chance of qualifying for the Olympics. Certain sports federations are preparing to let Russian athletes compete, but only after they are cleared by an independent review process to ensure that they have not publicly supported the war and are not affiliated with Russia’s military or other forces. For now, Russian sliders Matvei Perestoronin, Pavel Repilov and Daria Olesik are still expected to compete at this weekend’s luge World Cup stop in Lake Placid. All three participated in official training on Tuesday and are...

title: Kylian Mbappé le gana juicio al PSG
content: El delantero del , le ganó parte del juicio que sostiene contra el . La justicia francesa condenó al conjunto parisino a compensar con 61 millones de euros (71,7 millones de dólares) por primas y salarios impagados a su exjugador , que en 2024 se unió al conjunto español. Por distintos conceptos de aplicación del en vigor en , había reclamado casi 263 millones de euros (309 millones de dólares) a su anterior empleador, que solicitaba por su parte 440 millones de euros (517 millones de dólares) por daños y perjuicios. Las peticiones de fueron íntegramente rechazadas, mientras que las de se vieron principalmente limitadas a las primas. Además, salarios y vacaciones impagadas en la parte final de su contrato, siendo rechazado su reclamo de que el tipo de contrato fuera recalificado de temporal a indefinido. El club campeón de Francia y de Europa estará también obligado a informar a sus hinchas de esta decisión, en la primera página de su sitio web durante un mes. Preguntados sobre un eventual recurso, los abogados de PSG prefirieron en un primer momento no hacer comentarios sobre ello. Pero el club emitió luego una reacción en un comunicado, asegurando que «se reserva el derecho a recurrir». «PSG siempre ha actuado de buena fe y con integridad», añadió, deseando «al jugador lo mejor para el futuro de su carrera». Por su parte, «los representantes del señor Kylian Mbappé toman nota con satisfacción de la decisión comunicada en este día», manifestaron...

title: شاهد الآن البث المباشر لمباراة تشيلسي وكارديف سيتي في كأس رابطة الأندية الإنجليزية
content: يستضيف ملعب كارديف سيتي مساء اليوم الثلاثاء مباراة تجمع بين فريقي كارديف سيتي وتشيلسي حامل اللقب 5 مرات في الدور ربع النهائي من مسابقة كأس رابطة الأندية الإنجليزية. مشاهدة مباراة تشيلسي وكارديف سيتي في كأس رابطة الأندية الإنجليزية تبدأ أحداث مباراة تشيلسي وكارديف سيتي في تمام الساعة العاشرة مساء اليوم بتوقيت مصر الحادية عشرة مساءً بتوقيت السعودية وقطر والكويت الثانية عشرة منتصف الليل بتوقيت الإمارات. وتأهل تشيلسي للدور ربع النهائي في كأس رابطة الأندية الإنجليزية بعد تخطي لينكولن سيتي ووولفرهامبتون بفارق هدف وحيد في المباراتين واستعاد تشيلسي توازنه مؤخرًا بفوزه على إيفرتون 2- صفر في الدوري منهيًا سلسلة من أربع مباريات دون فوز. في المقابل يعيش كارديف سيتي موسمًا استثنائيًا بقيادة المدرب برايان باري مورفي، حيث يتصدر دوري الدرجة الثالثة بفارق 4 نقاط عن أقرب منافسيه. وقاد باري ميرفي فريق كارديف لاعتلاء صدارة دوري الدرجة الثالثة بفارق أربع نقاط بعد هبوط النادي الويلزي من دوري الدرجة الثانية وتعيينه مدربًا للفريق. وحقق كارديف الفوز في آخر 5 مباريات له في الدوري وتأهل للدور ربع النهائي في كأس الرابطة بفوز ثمين على بيرنلي الذي يلعب في الدوري الممتاز بنتيجة 2 - 1. تشكيل تشيلسي أمام كارديف سيتي في كأس الرابطة الإنجليزية حراسة المرمى: يورجينسين. خط الدفاع: أتشيمبونج، توسين، بادياشيل، هاتو. خط الوسط: كايسيدو، سانتوس، جورج، بونانوتي، جيتينز. خط الهجوم: جويو. القنوات الناقلة لمباراة تشيلسي وكارديف سيتي في كأس رابطة الأندية الإنجليزية تملك مجموعة قنوات beIN SPORTS الرياضية حقوق بث مباريات كأس رابطة الإنجليزية في الشرق الأوسط وشمال أفريقيا وستقوم بنقل...

title: The Latest: Hegseth and Rubio brief lawmakers on US military escalation
content: President Donald Trump’s top Cabinet officials overseeing national security are back on Capitol Hill on Tuesday as questions mount over the swift escalation of U.S. military force and deadly boat strikes in international waters near Venezuela. Secretary of State Marco Rubio , Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and others briefed members of the House and the Senate amid congressional investigations into a military strike in September that killed two survivors of an initial attack on a boat allegedly carrying cocaine in the Caribbean. Lawmakers have been examining the Sept. 2 attack as they sift through the rationale for a broader U.S. military buildup in the region that increasingly appears pointed at Venezuela.
creator: by the associated press

title: Virginia Roberts Guiffre's memoir sells 1M copies worldwide
content: NEW YORK (AP) — A posthumous memoir by one of Jeffrey Epstein's best known accusers, Virginia Roberts Guiffre, has sold 1 million copies worldwide two months after its release. Publisher Alfred A. Knopf announced Tuesday that more than half the sales for “Nobody's Girl,” came out of North America; in the U.S., the book is now in its 10th printing after an initial run of 70,000 copies. Guiffre's book, co-written by author-journalist Amy Wallace, was published in early October.
creator: hillel italie - ap national writer

title: Virginia Roberts Guiffre's memoir sells 1M copies worldwide
content: NEW YORK (AP) — A posthumous memoir by one of Jeffrey Epstein's best known accusers, Virginia Roberts Guiffre, has sold 1 million copies worldwide two months after its release. Publisher Alfred A. Knopf announced Tuesday that more than half the sales for “Nobody's Girl,” came out of North America; in the U.S., the book is now in its 10th printing after an initial run of 70,000 copies. Guiffre's book, co-written by author-journalist Amy Wallace, was published in early October. It helped revive criticism of former Prince Andrew, whom Guiffre alleged had sex with her when she was 17. And it heightened demands that the Justice Department release its files on Epstein, who killed himself in prison in 2019 while awaiting trial on sex trafficking charges. Guiffre died by suicide in April at age 41. “This is a bittersweet moment for us,” Guiffre's family, including siblings Sky Roberts and Danny Wilson, said in a statement. “We are enormously proud of our sister, and the impact she continues to have on the world. We’re also filled with so much sorrow that she couldn’t be here to witness the impact of her words. In her absence, our family remains committed to ensuring her voice is everlasting.” Within weeks of Guiffre's book being published, King Charles III stripped Andrew of his remaining titles and evicted him from his royal residence. Andrew has long denied Giuffre’s claims but stepped down from royal duties after a disastrous November 2019 BBC interview in which he attempted to...

title: الكشف عن صوت محمد صلاح في اختيارات الأفضل بجوائز "ذا بيست"
content: كشف الاتحاد الدولي لكرة القدم "فيفا" عن أصوات قادة المنتخبات الوطنية في التصويت على جوائز The Best لعام 2025، والتي شهدت إعلان اختيارات محمد صلاح، قائد منتخب مصر، في فئتي أفضل مدرب وأفضل لاعب في العالم. وفي تصويت أفضل مدرب في العالم لعام 2025، منح محمد صلاح صوته للمركز الأول للمدرب الإسباني لويس إنريكي، بينما جاء آرني سلوت في المركز الثاني، وحل الألماني هانز فليك ثالثًا. أما في فئة أفضل لاعب في العالم لعام 2025، فقد اختار قائد منتخب مصر النجم المغربي أشرف حكيمي في المركز الأول، يليه الفرنسي عثمان ديمبلي في المركز الثاني، فيما جاء كيليان مبابي في المركز الثالث. ويأتي تصويت محمد صلاح ضمن الأصوات الرسمية المعتمدة لقادة المنتخبات الوطنية، التي يعتمد عليها الاتحاد الدولي لكرة القدم في تحديد الفائزين بجوائز ذا بيست. جوائز ذا بيست.. ديمبيلي أفضل لاعب في العالم لعام 2025 توج الفرنسي عثمان ديمبيلي بجائزة أفضل لاعب في العالم لعام 2025 "ذا بيست"، المقدمة من الاتحاد الدولي لكرة القدم "فيفا". ونجح ديمبيلي في الجمع بين الكرة الذهبية وجائزة ذا بيست هذا الموسم، بعد موسم رائع مع باريس سان جيرمان توج فيها بجميع البطولات. وضمت قائمة المرشحين 11 اسمًا لامعًا، يتصدرهم رباعى باريس سان جيرمان: فيتينيا وأشرف حكيمى وعثمان ديمبيلي ونونو مينديز، إلى جانب «ثلاثي برشلونة»: رافينيا ولامين يامال وبيدري، بالإضافة إلى محمد صلاح قائد المنتخب الوطني ونجم ليفربول، والإنجليزى كول بالمر لاعب تشيلسي، والفرنسى كيليان مبابى مهاجم ريال مدريد، والإنجليزى هاري كين لاعب بايرن ميونخ. ويشهد حفل "ذا بيست" توزيع جوائز أفضل لاعب، أفضل لاعبة، أفضل مدرب لفريق رجال، أفضل مدرب لفريق...

title: AP News Summary at 4:38 p.m. EST
content: Prosecutors will charge Rob Reiner’s son Nick with 2 counts of murder in killing of his parents LOS ANGELES (AP) — Prosecutors say Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner will be charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents. Los Angeles County District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced the charges against 32-year-old Nick Reiner at a news conference on Tuesday. Prosecutors plan to file the charges, two counts of first degree murder special circumstances of multiple murders, later Tuesday. The announcement of the charges came two days after the famed actor and director Rob Reiner and his wife Michele Singer Reiner were found dead in their Los Angeles home. Their son Nick Reiner was arrested hours later. Nick Reiner’s attorney Alan Jackson said medical reasons kept his client from making his first court appearance Tuesday. Hegseth says he won't publicly release video of boat strike that killed survivors in the Caribbean WASHINGTON (AP) — Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth says the Pentagon will not publicly release unedited video of a strike that killed two survivors of an initial attack on a boat allegedly carrying cocaine in the Caribbean. Hegseth said that members of the Armed Services committees in the House and Senate would have an opportunity this week to review the video. But he did not say whether all members of Congress would be allowed to see it as well. President Donald Trump’s Cabinet members overseeing national security were on Capitol Hill on...

title: Prosecutors will charge Rob Reiner’s son Nick with 2 counts of murder in killing of his parents
content: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Los Angeles prosecutors said Tuesday that Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner will be charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents, which stunned their communities in Hollywood and Democratic politics, where both were widely beloved. Nick Reiner, 32, is suspected in the deaths of the 78-year-old actor and director Rob Reiner and his wife Michele Singer Reiner , District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced at a news conference with LA Police Chief Jim McDonnell.

title: Prosecutors will charge Rob Reiner’s son Nick with 2 counts of murder in killing of his parents
content: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Prosecutors said Tuesday that Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner will be charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents, which stunned their communities in Hollywood and Democratic politics, where both were widely beloved. Nick Reiner, 32, is suspected in the death of the 78-year-old actor and director Rob Reiner and his wife Michele Singer Reiner, District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced at a news conference with LA Police Chief Jim McDonnell. “Their loss is beyond tragic and we will commit ourselves to bringing their murderer to justice,” Hochman said. Prosecutors plan to file the charges, two counts of first degree murder with a special circumstance of multiple murders, later Tuesday. They will also include a special allegation that he used a dangerous weapon, a knife. “This case is heartbreaking and deeply personal, not only for the Reiner family and their loved ones but for our entire city,” McDonnell said. “We will continue to support the Reiner family and ensure that every step forward is taken with care, dignity and resolve.” The announcement of the charges came two days after the couple was found dead from apparent stab wounds in their home in the upscale Brentwood neighborhood of Los Angeles. Nick Reiner was arrested hours later in the Exposition Park area near the University of Southern California, about four miles (6.4 kilometers) from the crime scene. Nick Reiner had been expected to make an initial court appearance...

title: Left-hander Steven Matz and Rays finalize $15 million 2-year contract
content: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Left-handed pitcher Steven Matz is heading to Tampa Bay after finalizing a $15 million, two-year contract with the Rays. The deal will pay Matz $7.5 million annually. Matz would receive a one-time $500,000 assignment bonus if he's traded, payable by the acquiring team. Matz, 34, went 6-2 with a 3.05 ERA and two saves last season in a career-high 53 appearances with the St. Louis Cardinals and Boston Red Sox. He struck out 59 and walked 11 in 76 2/3 innings. He went 5-2 with one save and a 3.44 ERA for St. Louis in 32 appearances, including two starts. After getting traded to Boston, Matz was 0-0 with one save and a 2.08 ERA in 21 relief outings with the Red Sox. Matz walked only 3.6% of the batters he faced last season for the fourth-lowest percentage of any pitcher who worked at least 50 innings. He is 60-62 with a 4.19 ERA in 246 career appearances, including 172 starts. Matz has pitched for the New York Mets (2015-20), Toronto Blue Jays (2021), Cardinals (2021-25) and Red Sox (2025). Tampa Bay made room for Matz on its 40-man roster by designating outfielder Tristan Peters for assignment. Peters, 25, went 0 for 12 in four games with Tampa Bay last season. He hit .266 with a .355 on-base percentage, 15 homers, 76 RBIs and 11 steals in 136 games with Triple-A Durham. AP MLB: https://apnews.com/mlb

title: Saša Obradović se opet žalio na sudije, pa ustao i napustio konferenciju: Pomenuo je i utakmicu sa Partizanom
content: Košarkaši Crvene zvezde doživeli su i treći uzastopni poraz u Evroligi, ovoga puta su poraženi od Hapoela iz Tel Aviva u Izraelu sa 84:78, dok se posle utakmice još jednom na sudije požalio i trener crveno-belih Saša Obradović . Nije bio zadovoljan viđenim Saša Obradović - Mislim da ovakav tip protivnika, ovakva utakmica, odlučuje se u malim stvarima. Možda je oblik umora zbog rasporeda, imamo kratkku rotaciju. Hajde da kažemo, na kraju smo odradili neke taktičke promene. Nismo hteli da damo Blejkniju da šutne, hteli smo da tražimo bolje odluke u napadu. To su stvari koje su mogle da odluče utakmicu. Gotovo je, ne treba plakati. Mislim da smo odradili sjajan posao boreći se do kraja. Ima tu stvari koje treba promeniti, imali smo istu utakmicu kao protiv Partizana. Moramo naučiti kako da igramo do kraja ovakve utakmice. On je imao reči hvale za atmosferu u Izraelu. - Uvek je sjajna atmosfera, čak i sa "oba" Hapoela. Znali smo da će biti neverovatno, da će biti takva podrška. Nema tu šta mnogo da se kaže, mi smo tu da se takmičimo. Odlična utakmica. Dobio je i još jedno pitanje, posle čega je ustao i napustio konferenciju. - Ako treba da kažem nešto, mogli smo bolje da delimo loptu. Mogli smo možda da izvučemo više bacanja, bili su u bonusu. Ali da, to je to. Želim samo objašnjenje za tehničke lične greške. Ovo je drugi put u nizu. S druge strane rade isto ljudi. Kad se desi na jednoj strani, onda i na drugoj, mora da postoji neko...

title: "أم كلثوم هوية وانتماء".. لميس الحديدي تعلق على جدل فيلم "الست"
content: علقت الإعلامية لميس الحديدي على الحالة الفنية التي أحدثها فيلم "الست"، مشيرة إلى أنه على الرغم من حالة الجدل الواسع التي أحاطت بالعمل، إلا أنه حقق قفزة كبيرة في الإيرادات. وقالت خلال برنامجها "الصورة" المذاع على شاشة "النهار"، إن هذا النجاح الجماهيري يأتي رغم كل الانتقادات التي سبقت عرض الفيلم، والمشهد السينمائي انقسم مع طرح الفيلم في دور العرض حيث عبر قطاع واسع عن إعجابه الشديد بالعمل وأشاد بمستواه، بينما ظهرت في المقابل موجة من الاعتراضات الحادة على الرؤية التي قدمها المؤلف أحمد مراد لشخصية أم كلثوم، متساءلة: "هل استعرض الفيلم السيرة الذاتية وجوانب الحياة الخفية التي لا نعرفها عن كوكب الشرق؟". وأوضحت أن هذا المزيج من الجدل والإقبال الكثيف والتصفيق داخل القاعات يحمل دلالات مهمة، أولها أن الجمهور المصري والعربي يهتم بالسينما الجادة. وذكرت أن الفيلم لا ينتمي لفئة الكوميديا أو الأكشن، بل يتناول حياة فنانة رحلت منذ خمسين عاماً، مما يؤكد أن الناس بحاجة لمشاهدة أعمال سينمائية مختلفة وذات قيمة، حتى وإن كانت تثير الاختلاف في وجهات النظر. واختتمت الحديدي حديثها بالإشارة إلى دلالة أخرى تتعلق بخصوصية علاقة المصريين بمختلف أجيالهم بأم كلثوم، مؤكدة أن هذه العلاقة تتجاوز المفهوم التقليدي لجمهور يستمع لفنان ويصفق له، بل هي علاقة تمس الهوية والانتماء، قائلة: "هذه هي الست أم كلثوم، رمز وطني يتجاوز مجرد الغناء".
creator: مصراوي

title: Maryland will consider slavery reparations after Gov. Wes Moore's veto is overridden
content: ANNAPOLIS, Md. (AP) — Maryland will create a commission to study potential reparations for slavery after lawmakers voted Tuesday to override a veto by Gov. Wes Moore — currently the nation's only Black governor — that disappointed many fellow Democrats. Moore said in his veto letter in May that it was a difficult decision to veto the bill, which was a priority of the Legislative Black Caucus of Maryland. But he wrote there has been enough study of the legacy of slavery, and it was now time to “focus on the work itself" to address it.
creator: brian witte - associated press

title: Maryland will consider slavery reparations after Gov. Wes Moore's veto is overridden
content: ANNAPOLIS, Md. (AP) — Maryland will create a commission to study potential reparations for slavery after lawmakers voted Tuesday to override a veto by Gov. Wes Moore — currently the nation's only Black governor — that disappointed many fellow Democrats. Moore said in his veto letter in May that it was a difficult decision to veto the bill, which was a priority of the Legislative Black Caucus of Maryland. But he wrote there has been enough study of the legacy of slavery, and it was now time to “focus on the work itself" to address it. "Now is the time for continued action that delivers results for the people we serve,” Moore wrote. But Democrats who control both chambers of the Maryland General Assembly decided the commission was needed to better examine how to do that. “This topic isn't easy, but, again, without formal study, reparations risk being dismissed as symbolic or unconstitutional, regardless of moral merit,” said Sen. Charles Sydnor, a Democrat. Potential reparations outlined in the bill include official statements of apology, monetary compensation, property tax rebates, social service assistance, as well as licensing and permit fee waivers and reimbursement. Reparations also could include assistance with making a down payment on a home, business incentives, childcare, debt forgiveness and tuition payment waivers for higher education. Maryland's Black population is about 30%, the highest percentage of any state outside of the Deep South. Support for reparations...

content: ANNAPOLIS, Md. (AP) — Maryland will create a commission to study potential reparations for slavery after lawmakers voted Tuesday to override a veto by Gov. Wes Moore — currently the nation's only Black governor — that disappointed many fellow Democrats. Moore said in his veto letter in May that it was a difficult decision to veto the bill, which was a priority of the Legislative Black Caucus of Maryland. But he wrote there has been enough study of the legacy of slavery, and it was now time to “focus on the work itself" to address it.

title: Trump traveling to Delaware for return of Iowa National Guard members killed
content: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump is traveling to Dover Air Force Base in Delaware on Wednesday for a dignified transfer for the two Iowa National Guard members killed Saturday in an attack in the Syrian desert that is testing the rapprochement between Washington and Damascus. The two guardsmen killed in the attack were Sgt. Edgar Brian Torres-Tovar, 25, of Des Moines, and Sgt. William Nathaniel Howard, 29, of Marshalltown, according to the U.S. Army. Both were members of the 1st Squadron, 113th Cavalry Regiment. A U.S. civilian working as an interpreter was also killed. The ritual at Dover Air Force Base honors U.S. service members killed in action and is one of the most solemn duties undertaken by the commander-in-chief. During the process, transfer cases draped with the American flag holding the remains of fallen soldiers are carried from the military aircraft that brought them to Dover to an awaiting vehicle to transport them to the mortuary facility at the base. There, the fallen service members are prepared for their final resting place. Trump, a Republican, said during his first term that witnessing the dignified transfer of service members' remains is "the toughest thing I have to do " as president. Remembered as ‘the best of Iowa' The Iowa National Guard is remembering the two men as heroes. Howard's stepfather, Jeffrey Bunn, said Howard "loved what he was doing and would be the first in and last out," noting that he had wanted to be a soldier since he was a...
creator: SEUNG MIN KIM | The Associated Press

title: شاهد الأن البث المباشر لمباراة برشلونة وجوادالاخارا في كأس إسبانيا
content: يبدأ برشلونة مشواره في بطولة كأس ملك إسبانيا مساء اليوم الثلاثاء عندما يحل ضيفًا على فريق جوادالاخارا، على ملعب بيدرو إسكارتين ضمن منافسات دور الـ32 من المسابقة. مشاهدة مباراة برشلونة وجوادالاخارا في كأس إسبانيا تنطلق مباراة برشلونة وجوادالاخارا في الأوقات التالية: العاشرة مساءً بتوقيت القاهرة الحادية عشرة مساءً بتوقيت مكة المكرمة والدوحة والكويت الثانية عشرة منتصف الليل بتوقيت أبوظبي ومسقط. برشلونة يسعى لتعزيز رقمه القياسي يدخل برشلونة اللقاء بمعنويات مرتفعة، حيث يتطلع حامل اللقب بقيادة المدرب هانز فليك إلى تعزيز رقمه القياسي في بطولة كأس الملك، بعدما توج بالبطولة 32 مرة، متفوقًا على أتلتيك بيلباو صاحب الـ24 لقبًا، بينما يأتي ريال مدريد ثالثًا برصيد 20 لقبًا. ويعيش الفريق الكتالوني فترة مميزة محليًا، بعدما واصل تصدره جدول ترتيب الدوري الإسباني عقب فوزه الأخير على أوساسونا بهدفين دون رد في الجولة السادسة عشرة، ليرفع رصيده إلى 43 نقطة، متقدمًا بفارق أربع نقاط عن غريمه ريال مدريد. ويأمل هانز فليك في استغلال الحالة الفنية الجيدة التي يمر بها الفريق، من خلال الموازنة بين إشراك العناصر الأساسية ومنح الفرصة لبعض البدلاء، بهدف حسم بطاقة التأهل مبكرًا وتجنب أي مفاجآت محتملة في بطولة تُعرف دائمًا بمفاجآتها. جوادالاخارا وطموح المفاجأة على الجانب الآخر، نجح جوادالاخارا، الذي ينشط في الدرجة الثالثة الإسبانية، في بلوغ دور الـ32 بعد مشوار مميز في الأدوار السابقة، حيث تفوق على كاسيرينو بنتيجة 2-1، ثم أطاح بأتلتيكو سبتة بهدف دون مقابل في الدور الثاني. ورغم نتائجه المتواضعة هذا الموسم، حيث حقق 4 انتصارات وتعادل في 5 مباريات وتعرض لـ7 هزائم، إلا أن مواجهات...

title: Vlade Đurović pobesneo zbog igrača Zvezde: "On je bio ljubomoran na Batlera! Ima tretman kao da je Galis..."
content: Košarkaši Crvene zvezde posle neizvesne i dramatične završnice poraženi su od ekipe Hapoela iz Tel Aviva u Jerusalimu u okviru 16. kola Evrolige, čime su propustili šansu da dođu do potencijalnog brejka na strani - 84:78. Stručni konsultant i nekadašnji trener, Vlade Đurović je na TV "Arena Sport" analizirao današnji poraz Zvezde i istakao šta je to što je bilo problematično u njihovoj igri. Bio je besan na igru Kodija Milera Mekintajera. - Hrabra Zvezda, dobra Zvezda, borbena, baš su pružili jednu dobru partiju i pokazali Izrealcima da su izjave igrača i trenera uz veliko poštovanje. Brajant je rekao da je Zvezda odličan tim, koliko su se radovali pokazuje koliko su bili uplašeni od Zvezde, a Zvezda nije bila kompletna. Sve vreme mi je smetalo to što Mekintajer ima takav tretman kakav ima Dražen Petrović. On nije imao ovakav tretman, sigurno nije ovaj Sale Nacionale, Teodosić, da ima Larkin ovakav tretman, sedeo bi više na klupi nego on. Oni promašuju, nervoza totalna, mi u polukontri, on šutira ispred Itudisa trojku koju promašuje za pola metra, malo je to nešto skreaslo. Sve su napravili Nvora i Batler sa pet pasova, kad mi igramo, mi nemamo pasove kad je on na terenu. Ne može ekipa da igra dobro kada plejmejker ima osam poena. Davidovac, Motiejunas i Grejem nisu šutnuli jednu loptu, a Kalinić je jednom i Izundu jednom - rekao je Đurović, pa nastavio u dahu: - Ne može, sve ostalo on uzima, ne može to tako. On je bio ljubomoran na...
creator: srđan todorović

title: Letter: Woke up
content: I handled classified materials as a Field Artillery Officer in the ‘70s. I dealt with the codes for the tactical nuclear artillery shells we would use if “the balloon went up” — an anodyne way of saying a nuclear war had begun and a vast majority of the world’s population would die. Then, I went to seminary and became a chaplain for the Air Force. While stationed at Dover Air Force Base, I ministered to families who had lost loved ones while in the line of duty. I met the families on the tarmac as the flag-draped coffins of their loved ones arrived, prayed with them, listened to their stories, and did my best to offer them as much solace as possible. That assignment broke my heart and made an indelible impression on me. I am glad I don't have a son or daughter or grandkids in the military these days. I am also happy I am not deployed in a combat zone. The gleeful criminality of President Trump and his secretary of defense handling classified information disgusts me. Their disregard for the safety of our military service members, those in our intelligence community and our allies has strategically weakened our country and democracies across the globe. I don't know what to do except write these letters and hope against hope that some will wake up and get Trump and his cronies out of office. Woke? Yeah, I'm woke — to this insanity. Melvin Brinkley Davis
creator: letter to the editor

title: Is The Dalmore’s $44,450 Whisky Set Worth the Price of a Luxury Car?
content: The Dalmore has been a cherished name in Scotch since the mid-1800s. . While it’s now commonplace to encounter single malts aged in all manner of seasoned oak, this historic Highland distiller was developing relationships with reputable barrel builders as early as 1868—long before it was in fashion. Back then, most of the brand’s competitors were happy storing their respective liquids in whatever casks they could get their hands on. To honor and underscore this point of distinction, The Dalmore launched its Cask Curation Series in 2023. —a triptych of robust Scotches ranging from 26- to 43-years in age. Each single malt was influenced by sherry-seasoned barrels from the Gonzalez Byass bodega of Jerez, . Last year, the sequel arrived by way of the bright and berried , which was another standout in the realm of ultra-high-end whisky.
creator: brad japhe

title: Grok spews misinformation about deadly Australia shooting
content: Elon Musk's AI chatbot Grok churned out misinformation about Australia's Bondi Beach mass shooting, misidentifying a key figure who saved lives and falsely claiming that a victim staged his injuries, researchers said Tuesday. The episode highlights how chatbots often deliver confident yet false responses during fast-developing news events, fueling information chaos as online platforms scale back human fact-checking and content moderation. The attack during a Jewish festival on Sunday in the beach suburb of Sydney was one of Australia's worst mass shootings, leaving 15 people dead and dozens wounded. Among the falsehoods Grok circulated was its repeated misidentification of Ahmed al Ahmed, who was widely hailed as a Bondi Beach hero after he risked his life to wrest a gun from one of the attackers. In one post reviewed by AFP, Grok claimed the verified clip of the confrontation was "an old viral video of a man climbing a palm tree in a parking lot, possibly to trim it," suggesting it "may be staged." Citing credible media sources such as CNN, Grok separately misidentified an image of Ahmed as that of an Israeli hostage held by the Palestinian militant group Hamas for more than 700 days. When asked about another scene from the attack, Grok incorrectly claimed it was footage from tropical "cyclone Alfred," which generated heavy weather across the Australian coast earlier this year. Only after another user pressed the chatbot to re-evaluate its answer did Grok backpedal and...
creator: anuj chopra afp

title: West Sacramento murder defendant admits to manslaughter
content: WOODLAND — The defendant in a 2022 West Sacramento murder case made a plea agreement Tuesday that’s expected to result in a 17-year state prison term. Alfonso Rigoberto Ornelas Vazquez, 25, pleaded no contest to a lesser charge of voluntary manslaughter with use of a deadly weapon, along with added counts of carrying a concealed dirk or dagger, assault with infliction of great bodily injury and mayhem, according to Yolo Superior Court documents. West Sacramento police arrested Ornelas on Aug. 13, 2022, a day after a passerby found the body of an unhoused woman, Christine Hushbeck Davenport, near her tent along the railroad tracks near Sacramento Avenue and Reuter Drive. The 44-year-old died of multiple blunt-force injuries, having suffered three blows to the head that "all were significant enough to cause death," forensic pathologist Dr. Sarah Avedschmidt said at Ornelas’ preliminary hearing. That October 2022 proceeding included testimony from Ornelas' roofing colleague, who said the defendant initiated a bizarre conversation one day. "He asked me if I lost reasoning when I got angry," Jose Flores said. Then, "he told me why he lost his reasoning." At first, Flores' thoughts went to Ornelas' girlfriend, Diana, and he asked whether Ornelas had harmed her. "He said it was not her. 'I killed someone else, another woman,' " Ornelas replied, according to Flores. "He said she was homeless. ...I asked him, why did you do it, and he said he was wanting to kill someone because he...

title: "Svadba neće biti pompezna" Saša Kovačević o karijeri i verenici: "Nisam hteo da je zaprosim na koncertu"
content: Pevač Saša Kovačević večeras održava koncert u prepunom Sava centru, a publika je s nestrpljenjem iščekivala prvi ton njegovih pesama.Saša je poslednji put nastupao u ovom prostoru pre 15 godina, a kako sam priznaje, mnogo se toga promenilo. - Promenilo se mnogo stvari, 15 godina je prošlo od prošlog koncerta u Sava centru. Sazreo sam. Mnogo više pesama i publike. Spreman sam za ovaj koncert. Velika je odgovornost. Srce na kravatu, ljubav, kod mene se sve svodi na neku prelepu energiju. Ovo je moj blagi detalj za svu publiku večeras.Pevač je nedavno verio svoju dugogodišnju partnerku Zoranu Tasovac tokom romantičnog putovanja, a svadbu planiraju u najužem krugu prijatelja i porodice.- Verenica je stigla, već oko 7 sati je bila spremna kao puška. Ja verenici uvek posvećujem pesmu "Živim da te volim". To je od samog početka naše veze, naša pesma. Ja ne volim vezu preterano javno da eksponiram. Zato nisam hteo na koncertu da je zaprosim. Volim da se to dešava u najužem krugu prijatelja i porodice. Svadba neće biti pompezna.Kao najveću podršku istakao je brata Radeta i oca, koji je do skoro vodio njegovu karijeru.- Rade je moja najveća podrška, sve radimo zajedno. Naravno zajedno sa mojim ocem, koji je vodio moju karijeru. Sada je u nekim godinama, pa ne može baš da se posveti u potpunosti. Podsetimo, Saša Kovačević se pred medijima pojavio u elegantnom odelu, dok su u isto vreme pristizale mnoge poznate ličnosti u Sava centar.Među prvima je...
creator: aleksandra šćekić

title: Motociclista choca contra un poste y pierde la vida en Lempira
content: Un trágico accidente de tránsito cobró hoy la vida de un joven motociclista en la carretera que conduce al municipio de La Campa, en el departamento de Lempira. La víctima fue identificada como , originario del sector de Rancho Obispo, en San Manuel de Colohete, Lempira. Los reportes preliminares indican que el joven se conducía en su motocicleta cuando, por causas que aún se investigan, perdió el control del vehículo y terminó impactando violentamente contra un poste a la orilla de la carretera. La motocicleta, una herramienta esencial de transporte en la zona, quedó completamente volcada, con las llantas hacia arriba, mientras que el cuerpo de Ever quedó tendido en la cuneta adyacente a la vía. Autoridades y cuerpos de socorro se hicieron presentes para confirmar el deceso y acordonar el área. La noticia de la muerte de Ever David ha generado una profunda tristeza en su comunidad natal. Familiares y amigos han recurrido a las redes sociales para expresar su dolor y solidarizarse con la familia. Un internauta dejó un emotivo mensaje: «Dios le dé consuelo y fortaleza a su madrecita y demás familiares, ya que uno no puede calmar ese dolor, solamente nuestro señor Jesucristo», haciendo hincapié en la fe como único consuelo ante una pérdida tan dolorosa e inesperada. Las autoridades hacen un llamado a los conductores de motocicletas en la zona a extremar las medidas de precaución y a respetar los límites de velocidad, especialmente en carreteras con curvas...
creator: keily ramirez

title: Colleague at Milwaukee judge's trial says she was 'shocked' at her actions
content: MILWAUKEE (AP) — A colleague of the Milwaukee judge accused of helping a Mexican immigrant evade arrest testified Tuesday that she was shocked by her fellow judge's behavior. “Judges shouldn’t help defendants evade arrest,” Milwaukee County Circuit Judge Kristela Cervera testified at Hannah Dugan's trial. The testimony on the second day of trial came after officers involved in the arrest told the jury that Dugan's behavior on April 18 made it more dangerous for them to do their jobs. Dugan is on trial on charges of obstruction and concealment in connection with the incident. The maximum sentence for obstruction, the more serious charge, is five years in prison, though federal judges have much discretion to go lower. The highly unusual charges against a sitting judge are an extraordinary consequence of President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown. Dugan's supporters say Trump is looking to make an example of her to blunt judicial opposition to immigration arrests. Eduardo Flores-Ruiz was scheduled to appear before Dugan on the morning of April 18 on state battery charges. Prosecutors allege that after Dugan learned that federal officers were in the hallway waiting to arrest him, she cleared a path for him to escape by directing the officers to the chief judge’s office and then leading Eduardo-Flores out of her courtroom through a private door. Cervera testified that she was irritated that Dugan used her as backup during the incident, making her come out of her courtroom...
creator: todd richmond - associated press

title: Colleague at Milwaukee judge's trial says she was 'shocked' at her actions
content: MILWAUKEE (AP) — A colleague of the Milwaukee judge accused of helping a Mexican immigrant evade arrest testified Tuesday that she was shocked by her fellow judge's behavior. “Judges shouldn’t help defendants evade arrest,” Milwaukee County Circuit Judge Kristela Cervera testified at Hannah Dugan's trial. The testimony on the second day of trial came after officers involved in the arrest told the jury that Dugan's behavior on April 18 made it more dangerous for them to do their jobs. Dugan is on trial on charges of obstruction and concealment in connection with the incident. The maximum sentence for obstruction, the more serious charge, is five years in prison, though federal judges have much discretion to go lower. The highly unusual charges against a sitting judge are an extraordinary consequence of President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown. Dugan's supporters say Trump is looking to make an example of her to blunt judicial opposition to immigration arrests. Eduardo Flores-Ruiz was scheduled to appear before Dugan on the morning of April 18 on state battery charges. Prosecutors allege that after Dugan learned that federal officers were in the hallway waiting to arrest him, she cleared a path for him to escape by directing the officers to the chief judge’s office and then leading Eduardo-Flores out of her courtroom through a private door. Cervera testified that she was irritated that Dugan used her as backup during the incident, making her come out of her courtroom...

title: Colleague at Milwaukee judge's trial says she was 'shocked' at her actions
content: MILWAUKEE (AP) — A colleague of the Milwaukee judge accused of helping an immigrant evade arrest testified Tuesday that she was shocked by her fellow judge's behavior. “Judges shouldn’t help defendants evade arrest,” Milwaukee County Circuit Judge Kristela Cervera testified at Hannah Dugan's trial. The testimony on the second day of trial came after officers involved in the arrest told the jury that Dugan's behavior on April 18 made it more dangerous for them to do their jobs. Dugan is on trial on charges of obstruction and concealment for her role in the incident. Prosecutors say that after she learned federal authorities were waiting outside her courtroom to arrest Eduardo Flores-Ruiz, she cleared a path for his escape by directing the agents to the chief judge's office and leading Flores-Ruiz out of her courtroom through a private door. The highly unusual charges against a sitting judge are an extraordinary consequence of President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown. Dugan's supporters say Trump is looking to make an example of her to blunt judicial opposition to immigration arrests. Cervera testified that she was irritated that Dugan used her as backup during the incident, making her come out of her courtroom into the hallway while still wearing her robe. Dugan proceeded to angrily confront two officers waiting to arrest Flores-Ruiz, telling them repeatedly that they needed a judicial warrant before sending them to the chief judge’s chambers, Cervera testified. title: USC starting quarterback Jayden Maiava is returning for the 2026 season
content: LOS ANGELES — USC's starting quarterback is returning for another season in 2026. Jayden Maiava made it official Tuesday as the school announced that he had re-signed with the program for the upcoming season, his third with the Trojans. Maiava led USC to a 9-3 record in his first full season as starter after taking over the job during the final month of the 2023 season. He threw for 3,431 yards, 23 touchdowns and eight interceptions. He also added six scores on the ground. That strong performance led to questions of whether Maiava might declare for the NFL draft. Some prognosticators viewed Maiava as one of the better potential quarterback prospects in a draft especially thin on passers. Instead, Maiava will run it back at USC, where the Trojans are set to return most of their dynamic 2025 offense in 2026 — the exception being their top two wideouts Makai Lemon and Ja'Kobi Lane, who both declared for the draft. USC announced earlier this week that it had re-signed No. 1 running back Waymond Jordan and receivers Tanook Hines and Zacharyus Williams for the 2026 season. Maiava's return now turns the attention to five-star backup Husan Longstreet, who will have a decision to make about his future at USC. It's unclear if Longstreet would be willing to wait another season behind Maiava. ____. ©2025 Los Angeles Times. Visit latimes.com . Distributed by Tribune Content Agency, LLC.
creator: ryan kartje - los angeles times (tns)

title: Supermarkt-Täuschung: Wie Hersteller Schokolade ersetzen
content: 16. Dezember 2025 Susanne Aigner Viele Weihnachtsmänner enthalten keine echte Schokolade mehr – sondern billigen Ersatz. Verbraucherschützer schlagen Alarm. Für einen 40 Gramm schweren Weihnachtsmann der Schweizer Marke Lindt zahlen Sie derzeit 2,69 Euro. Letztes Jahr waren es 1,99 Euro. Bei gleicher Menge stieg der Preis innerhalb eines Jahres um 35 Prozent. Ähnliches stellte die Verbraucherzentrale Hamburg bei Schoko-Weihnachtsmännern von Milka, Ferrero und sogar Discount-Schokoladenmännern fest. Lesen Sie mehr nach der Anzeige In vielen Schokoladenprodukten wird Schokolade zunehmend durch fetthaltige Imitationen ersetzt, wie die Verbraucherzentrale Hamburg herausgefunden hat. Beispielsweise wurde beim Überziehen eines Produkts mit Schokolade die Kakaobutter vollständig durch pflanzliche Fette ersetzt. Auf der Verpackung des Produkts steht jetzt „Rosinen mit Milchschokoladengeschmack“. Aufgrund der gestiegenen Kosten wurde die Rezeptur angepasst, wie der Hersteller erklärt. Auf der Zutatenliste stehen nun Palm- und Sheafett statt Kakaobutter. Auch der Preis ist gestiegen. Das sei problematisch, kritisiert die Verbraucherzentrale, denn die Kunden erwarteten eine echte Kuvertüre. Gestreckte Kakaotropfen oder Fettglasur ersetzen Schokolade Für das Wholey Granola Choc Sea Salt Müsli ersetzte der Hersteller Green Grizzly heimlich echte dunkle Schokolade durch „Kakaodrops“ gemischt mit Reisextraktpulver, wie das Portal Food Clarity der Verbraucherzentralen...

(NYSE: BAX) and Molina Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: MOH) on behalf of long-term stockholders. More information about each potential case can be found at the link provided. Baxter International, Inc. The Complaint alleged that throughout the Class Period, Defendants misled investors by failing to disclose that: (1) the Novum LVP suffered systemic defects that caused widespread malfunctions, including underinfusion, overinfusion, and complete non-delivery of fluids, which exposed patients to risks of serious injury or death; (2) Baxter was notified of multiple device malfunctions, injuries, and deaths from these defects; (3) Baxter's attempts to address these defects through customer alerts were inadequate remedial measures, when design flaws persisted and continued to cause serious harm to patients; (4) as a result, there was a heightened risk that customers would be instructed to take existing Novum LVPs out of service and that Baxter would completely pause all new sales of these pumps; and (5) based on the foregoing, Baxter's statements about the safety, efficacy, product rollout,...

title: Exodus, MoonPay and M0 Unveil a New Digital Dollar for Everyday Payments
content: OMAHA, Neb., Dec. 16, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Exodus Movement, Inc. (NYSE American: EXOD) (“Exodus”), a leading self-custodial digital asset platform, today announced a partnership with MoonPay to launch a fully reserved, USD-backed dollar stablecoin that will power digital dollar experiences across the Exodus ecosystem. The asset will be issued and managed by MoonPay and developed using M0’s open stablecoin infrastructure. The launch builds on Exodus Pay , a new and upcoming everyday payment experience in the Exodus app that will let customers use stablecoins to spend and send money, earn rewards, and maintain self-custody—without needing to understand anything about cryptocurrency. The dedicated digital dollar will bring the reliability, speed, and global scale of stablecoins to consumer crypto experiences and support the expansion of Exodus’ payments ecosystem over time. “Stablecoins are quickly becoming the simplest way for people to hold and move dollars onchain, but the experience still needs to meet the expectations set by today’s consumer apps,” said JP Richardson, CEO and Co-Founder of Exodus. “This launch will bring a digital dollar experience to Exodus to make spending and sending money around the world simple, starting with next-gen payments experiences like Exodus Pay.” The digital dollar will be available across MoonPay’s global distribution network, including buy, sell, swap, deposit, and checkout experiences, providing broad access and real-world utility for...
creator: exodus - (globe newswire)

title: "غربلة المطورين".. متحدث الحكومة يكشف عن تشريع مرتقب لضبط السوق العقارات
content: كتبت -داليا الظنيني: أكد المستشار محمد الحمصاني، المتحدث الرسمي باسم مجلس الوزراء، أن اجتماع الدكتور مصطفى مدبولي، رئيس مجلس الوزراء، مع اللجنة الاستشارية للتنمية العمرانية ومطوري العقارات تتضمن لوضع آليات واضحة لتنظيم السوق العقاري المصري وضمان محاسبة المطورين الذين يتسمون بعدم الجدية. وأوضح الحمصاني، في مداخلة هاتفية مع برنامج "الساعة 6" على قناة الحياة، أن هناك مقترحات قيد الدراسة تهدف إلى إصدار تشريع خاص يهدف إلى تصنيف المطورين العقاريين. وأضاف أن هذا التصنيف سيكون بناءً على سجل أدائهم ومدى التزامهم بالجداول الزمنية والمواعيد المتفق عليها، مما يوفر للمواطن مؤشراً واضحاً وموثوقاً لتقييم جدية المطور قبل الشراء. وذكر أن هذا التشريع سيساعد على ما وصفه بـ "غربلة" المطورين في السوق، موضحا أن الهدف هو التمييز بوضوح بين المطورين الجادين القادرين على تنفيذ المشروعات الكبرى والضخمة، وبين غير الجادين الذين قد لا تتجاوز قدرتهم تنفيذ مشروعات صغيرة. وأشار إلى أن الضوابط تهدف بشكل أساسي إلى حماية حقوق المواطنين والمشترين وضمان الالتزام بكافة المواصفات وتوقيتات التسليم المتفق عليها. وأكد أن هذا التشريع يعد ركيزة أساسية ضمن جهود الحكومة لتحسين سمعة القطاع العقاري في مصر وتعزيز مصداقيته، مشيرا إلى أنه سيتم الانتهاء من إعداد هذا التشريع قريباً جداً، ليكون الأساس الذي تقوم عليه ضوابط حقيقية وفعالة لتنظيم السوق. ولفت "الحمصاني" إلى أن الحكومة تعمل على عدة مسارات متوازية، تهدف إلى تقديم حلول عملية لتوطين الصناعة، بالإضافة إلى ضبط السوق العقاري، بما يحقق مصلحة شاملة للاقتصاد القومي والمواطن المصري.
creator: مصراوي

title: Priča bake Soke je rasplakala čitavu Srbiju: Bila je gladna i promrzla, a sada sa radošću čeka praznike
content: "Kako da preživim ovu zimu" bile su reči bake Soke iz Ašanje, čija je tužna priča podigla čitavu Srbiju na noge, i to samo dan posle apela čuvenog srpskog humanitarca Marka Nikolića.Ljudi dobrog srca omogućili su baki, putem svojih donacija, topao stambeni kontejner koji je opremljen novim nameštajem, belom tehnikom, kuhinjom i kupatilom. Sada baka ima priliku da uživa u zimi i da se raduje predstojećim praznicima.Hladnu ruiniranu prostoriju zamenio je mekan i topao krevet. Više nema praznog frižidera i praznih polica, sve je dostojno dobre Sokine duše.Soka se danas uselila, a Marko je podelio delić atmosfere sa useljenja."Baka Soko, dobro došla u svoj novi dom", rekao je on, a potom je usledio odgovor koji topi i nahladnija srca:"Srećni bili i srećni praznici", rekla je baka sa suzama u očima. View this post on Instagram A post shared by Marko Nikolic (@markonikolic86)Za nju više zime nema, a njen osmeh je dokaz da nikada nije izgubila veru u ljude. View this post on Instagram A post shared by Marko Nikolic (@markonikolic86)Podsećanja radi, lsve je počelo kada je Marko Nikolić podelio na društvenim mrežama video koji kida dušu. Sama baka, u trošnoj kućici sa ispucalim zidovima, okružena hladnoćom i oskudicom."Desi se po ceo dan da ne jedem", govorila je baka Soka sa dubokom tugom u očima.Tada je pokazala svoj skromni prostor i krevet na kojem spava, toliko hladan da pomisli da neće preživeti zimu."Tresem se...", zavapila je, glasom koji se...

title: Bezahlen per Handy boomt: Anteil steigt auf 16 Prozent | Geld
content: TTS-Player überspringen↵Lesen Sie den Artikel weiterFrankfurt/Main – Immer mehr Menschen lassen ihr Portemonnaie zu Hause. An der Kasse oder Zapfsäule müssen Sie lediglich Ihr Handy zücken – und mit wenigen Klicks bezahlen. Smartphone- und Smartwatch-Zahlungen boomen: Ihr Anteil sprang von rund fünf Prozent (zweite Jahreshälfte 2022) auf fast 16 Prozent aller Kartenzahlungen (Ende 2024). Die Plastikkarte bleibt zunehmend in der Tasche.Das zeigt eine Studie der Bundesbank. Ein Grund für den Boom: Der Bezahlvorgang per Smartphone dauert im Schnitt nur 14 Sekunden. Physische Karten werden zunehmend durch ihre digitalen Bilder in Geldbörsen ersetzt.196 Millionen Zahlungskarten im UmlaufDie Zentralbank zählte Ende 2024 196 Millionen Zahlungskarten. Davon waren 162 Millionen (83 Prozent) Bankkarten, von denen das Geld sofort abgebucht wird. Ihre Zahl ist seit 2018 jährlich um 6,5 Prozent gewachsen.Klassische Kreditkarten mit späterer Abbuchung hatten dagegen das Nachsehen. Ihr Marktanteil sank auf 17 Prozent.Mehr zum ThemaDie Girocard hat weiterhin die Nase vornDie Girocard (ehemals EC-Karte) ist in Deutschland bleibt weiterhin Spitzenreiter. Ende 2024 machte es 72 Prozent des Umsatzes aus. Aber auch internationale Anbieter wie Visa und Mastercard sind vor allem über Direktbanken auf dem Vormarsch. Im europäischen Maßstab dominieren sie bereits mit einem Anteil von 69 Prozent den Markt.Ihr Vorteil: Nur 7 von 20 Euro-Ländern verfügen über ein eigenes nationales...

title: Texas Community Bancshares, Inc. Authorizes New Stock Repurchase Program
content: MINEOLA, Texas , Dec. 16, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Texas Community Bancshares, Inc. (the "Company") (NASDAQ: "TCBS"), the holding company of Broadstreet Bank, SSB, announced today that its Board of Directors has approved a new stock repurchase program that authorizes the Company to repurchase up to 144,364 shares, which equals approximately 5% of its outstanding common stock as of December 16, 2025. The Company also announced that as of December 16, 2025, it had completed the repurchase of 153,083 shares of its common stock authorized under the prior share repurchase program previously disclosed. The Company intends to conduct any repurchases through open market purchases, including by means of a trading plan adopted under SEC Rule 10b5-1, or in privately negotiated transactions, subject to market conditions and other factors. There is no guarantee as to the exact number of shares that the Company may repurchase. Throughout the execution of this program, the Company is committed to retaining the financial flexibility it needs to invest in its core operations. The stock repurchase program may be suspended or discontinued at any time. About Texas Community Bancshares, Inc. and Broadstreet Bank, SSB Texas Community Bancshares is the holding company for Broadstreet Bank, SSB, a Texas-chartered savings bank that operates seven locations in northeast Texas. Established in 1934, Broadstreet Bank opened as a Savings and Loan Association with $4,057 in assets and has since grown into a...

title: Fulton Financial Corporation Announces Increased Common Stock Dividend, Preferred Stock Dividend and $150 Million Repurchase Program
content: LANCASTER, Pa., Dec. 16, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Fulton Financial Corporation ("Fulton") (Nasdaq: FULT) today announced that its Board of Directors (the "Board") declared a quarterly cash dividend of nineteen cents per share on its common stock, payable on January 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025. This is a one cent per share increase from the quarterly cash dividend that the Board declared on September 16, 2025. "The Board's decision to increase our common dividend and increase our share repurchase program demonstrates our continued strength, confidence and commitment to delivering value to our shareholders," said Chairman and CEO Curt Myers. In addition, Fulton announced that the Board declared a quarterly dividend of $12.81 per share (equivalent to $0.32025 per depositary share) on its Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series A ("Preferred Stock"), payable on January 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025, for the period from and including October 15, 2025, to but excluding, January 15, 2026. Fulton also announced that the Board approved the repurchase of shares of Fulton's common stock and other securities in an aggregate principal amount not to exceed $150 million commencing on January 1, 2026, and expiring on January 31, 2027 (the "2026 Program"). Under the 2026 Program, up to $25 million, in the aggregate, may be used to repurchase shares of Fulton's Preferred Stock, Fulton's 3.250% Fixed-to-Floating Rate...

title: Stocks mostly retreat on US jobs, oil drops on Ukraine hopes
content: Stock markets mostly fell Tuesday as the US jobless rate hit its highest level since 2021, while oil prices slumped on renewed hopes for an end to Russia's war in Ukraine. The US Labor Department reported that unemployment climbed to 4.6 percent in November, its highest level in four years. The report, delayed by a lengthy government shutdown, also indicated that the US economy lost 105,000 jobs in October. Hiring picked up again in November to 64,000, but this was still a slower pace than before. "Today's US data releases were overall weaker than expected, although not as bad as some had feared either," said Forex.com analyst Fawad Razaqzada. He noted that market expectations of a Federal Reserve rate cut in March increased to 60 percent after the jobs report, up from around 50 percent. While poor data boosting the chance of interest rate cuts by the US Federal Reserve can often prop up stocks, Wall Street's main indices pushed lower on signs of a weaker economy. Separate data showed US retail sales held stable in October, while analysts had been looking for a small gain, and September's rise was revised down to 0.1 percent. But eToro analyst Bret Kenwell pointed out that part of the report that is used for calculating gross domestic product hit its highest level since the summer. "Today's update underscores two themes that have been in place: A resilient consumer and a cooling labor market," he said. Meanwhile, the Brent international oil benchmark dropped below $60 per...

title: CODIS & SISA realizan con éxito el lanzamiento de 'Wet n Wild' en la cadena de Walmart
content: . Compañía Distribuidora (CODIS) y Surtidora Internacional (SISA) anunciaron con entusiasmo el lanzamiento oficial del portafolio completo de maquillaje ‘Wet n Wild’ en la cadena de supermercados Walmart a nivel nacional. Esta estratégica lleva a las consumidoras hondureñas una marca globalmente reconocida por su innovación, calidad y accesibilidad. El evento de presentación reunió a ejecutivos de CODIS & SISA, Walmart, socios comerciales estratégicos, medios de comunicación e invitados especiales. Todos pudieron conocer de primera mano la amplia gama de productos, con una demostración en vivo con una experta en maquillaje, que ahora están disponibles en las principales ciudades del país. Wet n Wild, importada directamente desde Los Ángeles, California, se posiciona como el maquillaje «feroz» perfecto para mujeres audaces y seguras de sí mismas. Con una variada que incluye bases, labiales, sombras, máscaras y mucho más. La marca destaca por su alta pigmentación, fórmulas de larga duración y precios accesibles. Toto ello permite a todas las hondureñas experimentar con looks frescos, naturales y atrevidos sin comprometer su presupuesto. Los productos Wet n Wild ya están disponibles en todas las tiendas Walmart del país: Sauce, Cascadas Mall, supermercados Paiz de la colonia Kennedy, Multiplaza, Próceres, colonia América y Plaza Miraflores. title: US Capitol unveils statue of teen civil rights icon Barbara Rose Johns, taking Robert E. Lee's spot
content: The U.S. Capitol on Tuesday began displaying a statue of a teenaged Barbara Rose Johns as she protested poor conditions at her segregated Virginia high school, a pointed replacement for a statue of Confederate Gen. Robert E. Lee that was removed several years ago . An unveiling ceremony of the statue representing Virginia in the Capitol took place in Emancipation Hall, featuring Republican House Speaker Mike Johnson, Democratic Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Republican Virginia Gov. Glenn Youngkin, Virginia's congressional delegation and Democratic Gov.-elect Abigail Spanberger.
creator: jonathan mattise

title: US Capitol unveils statue of teen civil rights icon Barbara Rose Johns, taking Robert E. Lee's spot
content: The U.S. Capitol on Tuesday began displaying a statue of a teenaged Barbara Rose Johns as she protested poor conditions at her segregated Virginia high school, a pointed replacement for a statue of Confederate Gen. Robert E. Lee that was removed several years ago . An unveiling ceremony of the statue representing Virginia in the Capitol was taking place in Emancipation Hall, featuring Republican House Speaker Mike Johnson, Democratic Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Republican Virginia Gov. Glenn Youngkin and Virginia's congressional delegation. Johnson said more than 200 members of Johns' family were on hand, listening on as the ceremony opened with a rendition of “How Great Thou Art” performed by the Eastern Senior High School choir in Washington. "We are here to honor one of America’s true trailblazers, a woman who embodied the essence of the American spirit in her fight for liberty and justice and equal treatment under the law, the indomitable Barbara Rose Johns,” Johnson said. Johns was 16 years old in 1951 when she led a student strike for equal education at R.R. Moton High School in Farmville, Virginia. The students’ cause gained the support of NAACP lawyers, who filed a lawsuit that would become one of the five cases that the U.S. Supreme Court reviewed in Brown v. Board of Education. The high court’s landmark 1954 decision declared “separate but equal” public schools unconstitutional. Johns later married the Rev. William Powell and became Barbara Rose Johns Powell,...
