title: 「私は人間の脳を『ぬかみそ』のように捉えています」、脳科学者が語る「感情の動き」に向き合う心構え 【著者に聞く】『感情労働の未来』の恩蔵絢子が語るAI・SNS時代に改めて問い直す「感情労働」とは
content: 恩蔵: 感情労働という言葉の前提には、「私の感情は、私だけのものではない」という考え方があると思っています。 同じ時代を生きる人たちの間でも、「何をよいと感じるか」はさまざまです。たとえば父に料理を作った際に私は「おいしい」と言ってほしいと思いますが、父は「男はそんなことを言わないものだ」と育ってきた世代です。 文化や世代、コミュニティの中で共有されてきた「みんなの感情」があり、それぞれに感情の表現の仕方が違う。 ホックシールド氏が取材した客室乗務員の企業では、お客さんとぶつからないように「これが正解です」と示される感情表現のマニュアルがありました。そこに自分の感情を合わせるように教育されるのです。 この自分の感じていることと、求められる感情表現の間を埋める努力のことを、ホックシールド氏は「感情労働」と論じました。 ──OpenAIがGPT4oからGPT5へモデルを移行した際に、「GPT4oを返してほしい」という「#KEEP4O」運動が起きました。AIに対して共感したり、結婚を宣言したりする人まで現れています。こうした現象をどう捉えていますか。 恩蔵: 私は「AIに心はない」と考えています。ただ「心があるように見えてしまう」とも感じています。このような初めての存在に私たちは出会っていると捉えています。 人間の言語は、脳が生み出す最も高度な機能のひとつです。長い会話の体験を、私たちは「面白かった」「今日はこういうところがよかった」と圧縮して語ります。大規模言語モデル(LLM)は、その圧縮された人間の言葉を膨大なスケールで読み込み、パターンを学習している存在です。 人類が書き残した言葉の平面を横方向にどこまでも探索している。だから、私たちの知らない知識や「平均的にはこうした方がよい」という答えを返すことができるし、不快なことを言わないよう訓練もされています。 そういう存在に私たちは「人格」や「心」を見てしまう。言葉の平面の探索は非常に深く、人間以上に言葉の世界を知り尽くしているように見えるからです。 でも、一つの言葉の背後には膨大な経験がある。人間の心の深さは、時間をかけて経験を積み重ねていく縦方向の深さにあると私は考えています。AIがどれだけ言葉の表層を探索しても、感情の根本である「揺れ動く経験そのもの」には触れられない。だからAIには心はないと考えています。 ですが、目に見えない感情の動きを追うことによる認知的負荷から解放されたい私たちは、そもそも嫌なことを言わない、否定してこないAIに寄りかかりたくなるのだと思います。

title: Christmas trees go quick at local tree farm

title: 上司からの連絡に邪魔されず休日を穏やかに過ごすには、「つながらない権利」より「レスポンス主導権」の確保が必要
content: ( 川上 敬太郎 :ワークスタイル研究家) 「休日なのに職場から呼び出された」「家にいたら突然携帯が鳴って上司に説教された」──そんな経験をしたことがある人も多いだろう。勤務時間外は職場と切り離したいと考える人たちからは“つながらない権利”を求める声が聞こえてきます。 連合の 『“つながらない権利”に関する調査2023』 によれば、「勤務時間外に部下・同僚・上司から業務上の連絡がくることがある」と答えた人は7割超に及びます。勤務時間外に、職場からの連絡を受けた経験がない人の方がむしろ少ないようです。 フランスをはじめ、海外ではつながらない権利を法制化している例も見られます。ただ、完全に職場との連絡を遮断してしまって良いかは難しいところです。勤務時間外でも連絡を受けられるようにしておいた方が良いケースもあるかもしれません。 連合の調査でも、つながらない権利の法制化に対して「緊急性の高いトラブルへの対応が遅れてしまうこと」を心配する声が6割以上でした。 勤務時間外なのにつながるのは困る。しかし、完全につながらないのも困る。こうしたジレンマも見られる中、職場や働き手はつながらない権利の必要性についてどう受け止め、どう対処していけばよいのでしょうか。
creator: jbpress

title: Johanna Caballero: Turning community connections into a real estate career
content: Johanna Caballero had no plans to go into real estate. She worked for state Sen. Ben Hueso during his election campaign in 2013. Then for three years she was the district representative in Imperial Valley for the California State Senate. That work helped her establish and maintain working relationships with state and local agencies. She also gained experience in outreach, planning and conducting community events that benefit the public. Those are relationships and skills she continues to rely on today in her business and in her community involvement. Meanwhile, she said, “I had relatives in real estate. They urged me to join the team.” She decided, why not, explaining: “I’m not shy. I’m not afraid to speak to strangers.” So, in 2016, she entered the mortgage lending business and fell in love with her role in helping people realize the American dream of owning their own home. As a mortgage loan originator, “I am committed to helping my clients understand their options for real estate financing and assisting them to make solid home loan decisions that meet their needs.” It may take working with the family for a while to get their finances to the place where they qualify for a home loan, such as improving their credit and building their savings, she said. “Sometimes I’ve worked with people for a year or two before they qualify. Over that time, we develop a relationship. I am the person who helped them buy their home, and they remember that. This is the reason I really love my...

title: Take a pitstop at The Main Stop in Alburgh, Restaurant offers breakfast and lunch
content: ALBURGH — Owner Kara Babic wants to make Alburgh's newest restaurant, The Main Stop, a must-park, or at least slow down, attraction to Grand Isle County residents. “I love to cook but also just to help out the community with having something for everyone here that’s affordable,” she said. The location at 113 S. Main Street has seats for those who wish to take it slow, including outdoor chairs for the warmer seasons. For those on-the-go, there is a drive-thru that wraps around the building. The restaurant can be a quick stop for breakfast, but is also available for lunch and dinner. Breakfast is served 7-11 a.m., after which lunch takes over going until 6 p.m. Sunday is the only day with a different schedule starting at 8 a.m. and finishing at 5 p.m. The Main Stop’s breakfast is chock-full of donuts, muffins, turnovers, danishes and breakfast sandwiches. All the items not pastry-related on the menu are named after Alburgh’s twisting roads. By lunch, expect pizza, salad, soups and more sandwiches. “I really like the donuts,” Babic said. “We make the donuts right here every morning so they’re fresh. We sell a ton of donuts on the weekends, typically around 300.” Babic makes all the donuts everyday to keep them fresh. The donuts are so popular, she said they sell about 300 on the weekends. Inside the building, Babic has set up blue tables and chairs facing out to the traffic on Main Street. The space hosts events too, like a recent meet up with Santa Claus. The Main Stop is also...

title: Punishing truth-tellers is killing democracy
ガンダム、ライディーン、コン・バトラーV......日本を代表するアニメーター安彦良和の才能と名シーン誕生の逸話 渋谷区立松濤美術館にて「描く人、安彦良和」を開催
content: (ライター、構成作家:川岸 徹) 『機動戦士ガンダム』のキャラクターデザイナー兼アニメーションディレクターであり、漫画家としても活躍する安彦良和。約半世紀にわたる創作活動を展望する回顧展「描く人、安彦良和」が渋谷区立松濤美術館で開幕した。 日本を代表するアニメーター、安彦良和。代表作としてもっぱらキャラクターデザイナー兼アニメーションディレクターを務めた『機動戦士ガンダム』が挙げられるが、携わった作品は枚挙にいとまがない。『宇宙戦艦ヤマト』『勇者ライディーン』『超電磁ロボ コン・バトラーV』『無敵超人ザンボット3』『クラッシャージョウ』『アリオン』『ヴイナス戦記』......。JBpress読者の世代には、タイトルを聞いただけでキャラクターや名シーンが頭の中に蘇ってくるという人も多いのではないか。 そんな安彦良和の半世紀にわたる創作活動を展観する回顧展「描く人、安彦良和」が全国の美術館を巡回している。神戸、島根、青森、北海道に続き、東京の会場である渋谷区立松濤美術館にて開幕した。内覧会には安彦良和さんご本人が出席され、作品にまつわる思い出話を披露してくれた。そのコメントを交えながら、展覧会会場の様子や主な作品を紹介したい。 安彦良和は1947年、北海道遠軽町に開拓民3世として生まれた。鈴木光明『織田信長』、横山光輝『鉄人28号』、手塚治虫『新人類フウムーン』などに触発され、小学校の頃から漫画を描き始める。1966年、歴史教師になることを目指し、弘前大学文学科の西洋史専攻に進学。入学直後の6月からスペイン内戦に着想を得た長編漫画『遙かなるタホ河の流れ』を描き始め、翌年9月に完成した。 大学ノート2冊に描かれた総ページ数200ページ、全733コマから成る本編には、「革命...新しい国家。人民戦線...反ファシズム...なぜだ。この娘の前ではなぜこれらの言葉はこんなにも空々しく響くのだろう...」といった台詞も登場する。 「大学時代は学生運動に身を投じ、学生新聞を立ち上げるなどの活動を行いました。弘前大学に機動隊が突入した際に、僕は不在でしたがリーダー格と目されていたため逮捕され、大学は退学処分になってしまいます。それから東京へ出て、偶然見つけた虫プロダクションのアニメーター募集に応募。採用試験に持っていった『遙かなるタホ河の流れ』が評価され、一発で合格しました。長編漫画を描いていて、本当によかったです」(安彦さん)
creator: jbpress

title: Customs and Border Protection officer fires gun in dispute with driver at JFK airport
content: NEW YORK (AP) — An on-duty Customs and Border Protection officer fired his gun several times during a confrontation with another motorist Tuesday on an access road for New York’s Kennedy Airport, police said. The CBP officer told authorities that he pulled his weapon after the other driver attacked him over a minor traffic crash, Port Authority police said. It wasn’t clear if the shots hit anything. The other driver fled the scene after the shooting, according to the CBP officer, who was unhurt. The two-vehicle crash happened shortly before 5 a.m. near the airport's main car rental facilities on the tangle of roads and ramps that lead to the airport's terminals, administration buildings and cargo areas. JFK's roadways are currently undergoing a major construction overhaul and navigating the thicket of detours and traffic changes has been a source of frustration and confusion for many drivers. The Port Authority didn't say if the officer was driving an official vehicle. His name has not been released. CBP did not immediately comment. The investigation led to traffic delays in the area during the morning commute, but those issues lessened as the morning progressed.
creator: ap

JFK's roadways are currently undergoing a major construction overhaul and navigating the thicket of detours and traffic changes has been a source of frustration and confusion for many drivers. The Port Authority didn't say if the officer was driving an official vehicle. His name has not been released. The investigation led to traffic delays in the area during the morning commute, but those issues lessened as the morning progressed.

title: Customs and Border Protection officer fires gun in dispute with driver at JFK airport
content: NEW YORK (AP) — An on-duty Customs and Border Protection officer fired his gun several times during a confrontation with another motorist Tuesday on an access road for New York’s Kennedy Airport, police said. The CBP officer told authorities that he pulled his weapon after the other driver attacked him over a minor traffic crash, Port Authority police said.

title: Marin IJ Readers’ Forum for Dec. 17, 2025
content: San Rafael residents need to show more compassion I have been reading, with some displeasure, the recent articles about the “tiny homes” at a temporary shelter for homeless people proposed along Merrydale Road in San Rafael. It seems to me that the neighbors are disguising their “not in my backyard” attitude under the guise of lack of transparency about the process. I would hope that in affluent Marin we could show compassion and concern for those less fortunate. We should be willing to offer support for this project, which is trying to do its part to help unhoused people. — Anabelle Wasserman, San Rafael Marin should not provide any information to ICE The Marin County Sheriff’s Office applies for and receives money from the federal government in the form of the State Criminal Alien Assistance Program. In response, community members attended the Board of Supervisors meeting on Dec. 9, urging our sheriff to cease sharing any information with U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (“Protesters urge Marin supervisors to reject migrant detainee data grant,” Dec. 12). SCAAP provides funding given to counties in exchange for information about arrested immigrants. At the meeting, Marin County Executive Derek Johnson stated that Marin is compliant with California laws. It may be legal, but Marin is not required to participate in the program. According to the article in the IJ, it is intended “to cover officer salary costs incurred for jailing immigrants lacking permanent legal...

title: 9300 أسير فلسطيني.. والأغلبية في قبضة “الاعتقال الإداري”
content: كشفت مؤسسات الأسرى الفلسطينية، اليوم، عن القوائم المحدثة لأعداد الفلسطينيين القابعين داخل سجون الاحتلال الإسرائيلي، مؤكدة في بيان مشترك أن الحصيلة بلغت نحو 9300 أسير ومعتقل حتى بداية شهر ديسمبر الحالي.وأظهرت البيانات، التي استندت إلى تقارير المؤسسات الحقوقية وما أفصحت عنه إدارة سجون الاحتلال، أن الغالبية العظمى من هؤلاء الأسرى هم من الموقوفين رهن المحاكمة أو المعتقلين الإداريين المحتجزين دون تهم واضحة، في مؤشر دال على تصاعد سياسة الاعتقال كأداة عقاب جماعي ممنهجة.الثقب الأسود في المعسكراتوفي زاوية أكثر قتامة من المشهد، نبهت المؤسسات إلى أن هذا الرقم الضخم ورغم دلالته الصادمة، لا يعكس الصورة الكلية لأعداد المحتجزين الفعليين؛ إذ يستثني الإحصاء بشكل كامل المعتقلين المحتجزين داخل المعسكرات والقواعد العسكرية التابعة لجيش الاحتلال الإسرائيلي.هذا الاستثناء يفتح الباب أمام تساؤلات مخيفة حول أعداد “المخفيين” في تلك المراكز التي لا تخضع لنفس آليات الرصد والتوثيق المتاحة في السجون المركزية، مما يجعل الرقم الحقيقي مرشحًا للزيادة بشكل كبير خارج نطاق الرصد الرسمي.تم نشر هذه المقالة 9300 أسير فلسطيني.. والأغلبية في قبضة “الاعتقال الإداري” للمرة الأولي علي الوئام.

title: Colleague at Milwaukee judge's trial says she was 'shocked' at her actions
content: MILWAUKEE (AP) — A colleague of the Milwaukee judge accused of helping a Mexican immigrant evade arrest testified Tuesday that she was shocked by her fellow judge's behavior. “Judges shouldn’t help defendants evade arrest,” Milwaukee County Circuit Judge Kristela Cervera testified at Hannah Dugan's trial. The testimony on the second day of trial came after officers involved in the arrest told the jury that Dugan's behavior on April 18 made it more dangerous for them to do their jobs. Dugan is on trial on charges of obstruction and concealment in connection with the incident. The maximum sentence for obstruction, the more serious charge, is five years in prison, though federal judges have much discretion to go lower. The highly unusual charges against a sitting judge are an extraordinary consequence of President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown. Dugan's supporters say Trump is looking to make an example of her to blunt judicial opposition to immigration arrests. Eduardo Flores-Ruiz was scheduled to appear before Dugan on the morning of April 18 on state battery charges. Prosecutors allege that after Dugan learned that federal officers were in the hallway waiting to arrest him, she cleared a path for him to escape by directing the officers to the chief judge’s office and then leading Eduardo-Flores out of her courtroom through a private door. Cervera testified that she was irritated that Dugan used her as backup during the incident, making her come out of her courtroom...

title: Governor Morrisey Issues Statement on the Passing of Richard Browning
content: Richard Browning CHARLESTON, W.Va. — Former West Virginia legislator Richard Browning has died, Governor Patrick Morrisey announced Tuesday. Browning, who was 73, served nearly two decades in the state Legislature as an advocate for Wyoming County. Governor Morrisey issued a statement following the news: “I am very saddened to hear of the loss of former West Virginia legislator Richard Browning. Richard spent nearly 20 years serving the people of our state in the House of Delegates and State Senate as a dignified leader and an unwavering advocate for his community in Wyoming County. My prayers are with his wife, family, and loved ones during this difficult time.” Browning was first elected to the House of Delegates in 1988 and later served a term in the State Senate from 2008 to 2012.

title: Se reabre la venta de entradas para el Mundial. Lo que debes saber
content: Se abre otro período de venta de entradas para el Mundial. Los precios de las entradas para la Copa del Mundo del próximo año inicialmente oscilaron entre $60 para los partidos de fase de grupos y $6,730, la Prensa Asociada informó, aunque las cifras probablemente fluctúen con la fijación dinámica de precios. Tras dos fases previas de venta de entradas en septiembre y octubre, el jueves se abrió un sorteo aleatorio en el que los aficionados pueden solicitar la posibilidad de comprar entradas.. Esta es la primera fase de ventas tras la publicación completa del calendario de la Copa del Mundo a principios del mes, lo que significa que es la primera en la que los compradores saben cuales son dos equipos se enfrentarán en cada partido. A fines de noviembre, la liga dijo que ya había vendido 2 millones de entradas durante el sorteo de entradas anterior, a aficionados en 212 países y territorios. Los países anfitriones — Estados Unidos, Canadá y México — encabezaron las ventas en el nuevo formato de 48 países del Mundial 2026. El próximo sorteo de entradas se extenderá hasta las 8 a.m. del 13 de enero en FIFA.com/tickets . Las posibilidades de conseguir una entrada, dijo la liga, no se ven afectadas por el momento de la inscripción. Los solicitantes seleccionados serán notificados por correo electrónico, y se les cobrará por las entradas en febrero. Algunos aficionados probablemente buscarán entradas a través de revendedores terceros, aunque los precios...

title: Doctor sentenced to house arrest for supplying ketamine used by Matthew Perry
content: LOS ANGELES — Another physician who played a role in providing ketamine to Matthew Perry weeks before the actor’s overdose death was sentenced to eight months of house arrest by a federal judge on Friday. Mark Chavez, a former doctor, pleaded guilty to one count of conspiracy to distribute ketamine in October last year. In his plea agreement, Chavez acknowledged that he and Salvador Plasencia — an ex-doctor sentenced to nearly three years in prison earlier this month — colluded to deceive medical ketamine suppliers and illegally distribute the drug to Perry for profit. Chavez, 54, was also sentenced to three years of supervised release following his house arrest and must perform 300 hours of community service. Chavez was one of five individuals charged last year for their alleged roles in Perry’s October 2023 death. The others include Perry’s acquaintance Erik Fleming, personal assistant Kenneth Iwamasa and Jasveen Sangha, a North Hollywood woman allegedly known as the “Ketamine Queen.” All have pleaded guilty to federal charges and await sentencing in the coming months. During the sentencing, U.S. District Judge Sherrilyn Peace Garnett brought up concerns about sentencing disparities between Chavez and Plasencia. Assistant U.S. Attorney Ian Yaniello argued that the government’s recommended sentence of six months house arrest was due to Chavez’s cooperation with investigators. “As doctors, their conduct was egregious,” Yaniello said. “The difference was what they did when...
creator: christopher buchanan - los angeles times (tns)

title: No. 5 LSU dominates again in rout of Morgan State
content: No. 5 LSU nearly tripled the offensive output of its opponent Tuesday in a 91-33 rout of visiting Morgan State in front of a spirited crowd including thousands of schoolchildren from the Baton Rouge area. With 10 points and seven boards, Grace Knox was one of five LSU players who scored in double figures on Field Trip Day as the Tigers (12-0) overwhelmed Morgan State, which converted just 25% of its shots (11 of 44) and scored on consecutive possessions just once in the second half. Mikaylah Williams and Flau'jae Johnson led the Tigers with 14 points apiece, with Johnson adding four rebounds and two steals. MiLaysia Fulwiley notched 11 points, five rebounds, four assists and two steals, and Jada Richard added 10 points. Tigers head coach Kim Mulkey switched up her starting lineup again, putting freshman ZaKiyah Johnson and senior East Carolina transfer Amiya Joyner in the two starting frontcourt spots. They responded by combining for 14 points and 13 rebounds. Ja'la Bannerman and Michaela Bogans led the Lady Bears with eight points apiece. --Field Level Media

title: Continúa el "fuego cruzado" entre Real Madrid y Barcelona
content: El «fuego cruzado» está en su mejor momento entre los presidentes del , , y del , . El enfrentamiento es producto del , donde los madridistas exigen castigo por supuesto pago de árbitros de parte del conjunto . En esta ocasión, el hombre fuerte de los azulgranas levantó la mano para calificar de «desproporcionadas» las declaraciones de su homólogo madridista por el considera que en la entidad blanca ya no sufren «de barcelonitis, sino de barcelonitis aguda» y que es algo que «lo tienen instalado en el corazón del madridismo». El presidente del añadió: «A nosotros nos va bien, porque están más preocupados por nosotros que de lo que se tienen que preocupar». El dirigente azulgrana también aseguró que desde «siguen estirando el tema para justificar algo que no les está saliendo bien». Laporta advirtió que las declaraciones de Florentino Pérez tienen que ver con el hecho del nuevo alineamiento del y apartándose de la Superliga que lidera el «Si se ha cambiado el discurso será porque el año pasado había coincidencia en ciertos proyectos», dijo. Agregó que «y ahora, a la vista de que no han fructificado, no han llegado y tenemos un acuerdo con UEFA porque lo que buscamos es la paz en el fútbol y otros parece que no».

title: Shop with a Cop brings community, law enforcement together
content: BOONE — The annual Shop with a Cop event in Boone brought local law enforcement together with 10 area "junior officers" for some Christmas joy. The event — which featured multiple organizations, including Boone Police Department, Watauga County Sheriff’s Office, Blowing Rock Police Department, Town of Brookford Police Department, Appalachian State Police Department, rangers from the Blue Ridge Parkway, WAMY Community Action, Walmart, High Country Caregivers and Watauga County Schools — gave children in the community a chance to spend $250 on whatever they wanted for Christmas. "It's so important for these kids to have solid, good role models these days, and for the officers that come and take the time to be with them, it really does make an impact — whether they see the results or not," Boone PD Community Liaison Officer Kat Eller said. "It's something that the officers and the kids will remember for the rest of their lives, and they'll look back on it in such a positive way." Eller said that each kid was paired with an officer, and they, along with their caretaker, went around Walmart shopping for Christmas gifts. Eller said many of them picked out gifts not only for themselves but also for their siblings and other family members. Organizers worked with local groups like High Country Care Givers, the Children’s Council and Watauga County Schools to identify families who would benefit from this event. A $3,500 grant from Walmart helped ensure each participant got what they...

title: Alientan al manejo seguro de fuegos pirotécnicos
content: Con la finalidad de brindar protección a toda la comunidadCon el objetivo de prevenir accidentes y salvaguardar la integridad de las familias tlaxcaltecas, autoridades de seguridad y protección civil reiteraron el llamado a manejar con responsabilidad los fuegos pirotécnicos, especialmente durante la temporada de celebraciones.Se recordó que los hogares no deben utilizarse como lugares de almacenamiento de pirotecnia, ya que estos productos deben mantenerse en espacios seguros, frescos y fuera del alcance de niñas y niños. Asimismo, se advirtió que el automóvil tampoco es un medio seguro para su transporte, debido a que factores como el calor, una fuga de combustible o un corto circuito pueden provocar explosiones.Las autoridades señalaron que guardar cohetes o artefactos pirotécnicos en los bolsillos representa un alto riesgo, pues la fricción puede ocasionar que se enciendan de manera accidental. De igual forma, se exhortó a no intentar volver a encender cohetes defectuosos o que no funcionaron previamente, y a desecharlos de manera adecuada para evitar incidentes.Finalmente, se informó que ante cualquier situación de emergencia relacionada con pirotecnia, la ciudadanía debe comunicarse de inmediato al número 911, donde personal capacitado brindará atención oportuna.La entrada Alientan al manejo seguro de fuegos pirotécnicos se publicó primero en Síntesis Tlaxcala.
creator: abril gómez

title: STRAVIČNE VESTI PRED FNC 26 PODGORICA: Borac se utopio u reci, beživotno telo izvukla policija
content: Čuveni MMA borac Geronimo Dos Santos, poznat pod nadimkom "Mondragon“, preminuo je u 45. godini života nakon tragične nesreće u Brazilu. Kako prenose brazilski mediji, Dos Santos je stradao tokom boravka u Sao Gabrijelu da Kašoeiri. U subotu je sa devojkom otišao na plivanje, ali se nije vratio. Njegovo telo pronađeno je dva dana kasnije, u ponedeljak, a lokalne vlasti su potom zvanično potvrdile vest o njegovoj smrti. Dos Santos je iza sebe ostavio dugu i bogatu borilačku karijeru. Tokom godina nastupao je za brojne poznate organizacije širom sveta, među kojima su "Mr. Cage", "RIZIN", "ACA2 i "Fight Nights Global". Godine 2012. potpisao je ugovor sa UFC-om, ali nikada nije debitovao u toj promociji, pošto se povukao iz meča protiv Gabrijela Gonzage zakazanog za UFC 153, nakon čega je raskinuo saradnju sa najvećom svetskom MMA organizacijom. Profesionalnu karijeru Dos Santos je završio sa skorom od 45 pobeda, 26 poraza i jednog nerešenog ishoda. Poslednji nastup imao je u BKFC organizaciji, gde je za svega 109 sekundi nokautirao bivšeg UFC izazivača Alekseja Oleinika. U planu je bila i borba protiv Andreja Arlovskog, ali se iz tog meča povukao. Geronimo Dos Santos ostaće upamćen kao izuzetno iskusan i harizmatičan borac, poznat po atraktivnom stilu i beskompromisnoj borbi, koji je ostavio dubok trag na MMA sceni širom sveta. Naša će ga publika pamtiti po meču protiv Ivana Vitasovića na FNC-u 7 u Puli, a ova tragična vest za borilački sport stigla...

title: Blue Earth and Nicollet counties set tax levy increases
content: Months of comments and discussion came to a close on Tuesday as the Blue Earth and Nicollet county boards passed 2026 tax levies. The process was quick enough in the historic Blue Earth County Courthouse Tuesday morning. County Administrator Bob Meyer introduced the proposal to approve an 8.5% increase in the levy for next year. The board approved it without any comment and moved on to passing the budget for 2026. That 8.5% figure was set in September at the preliminary tax levy hearing, and though the county made efforts to try and lower the increase over the past three months, it ended up being the final rate. Meanwhile, in Nicollet County, the story is slightly different. In September, the County Board set a preliminary levy that saw a 9.7% increase. “That was what was set in September ... and (Tuesday) the board voted to adopt a tax levy (increase) of 7.1%, so they did decrease it,” Nicollet County Administrator Mandy Landkamer said. Landkamer added that the decrease comes following months of discussion between board members on how to lower the levy in response to concerns from citizens. “(There was) just general concern about an increase in taxes,” Landkamer said. Both counties are struggling with the same thing. Many programs, especially at the federal level, are losing funding. However, those programs are mandated by the state. Counties have to administer programs such as SNAP and Medicaid, and when federal funding falls flat, counties are left with the bill. That...
creator: ethan becker ebecker@mankatofreepress.com

title: College-educated mothers increasingly marry before first child
content: WASHINGTON — College-educated women are increasingly likely to be married when they have their first child, while those without bachelor's degrees show the opposite trend, according to a new U.S. Census Bureau report. From 2020 to 2024, roughly 85% of first-time mothers with bachelor's degrees or higher were married at birth, up from about 75% in the early 1990s, the Census Bureau says. Only 4% of college-educated first-time mothers were neither married nor cohabiting, with 11% living with unmarried partners.

title: Litva zadržala 21 ľudí napojených na pašovanie cigariet z Bieloruska pomocou meteorologických balónov
content: VILNIUS - Litovskí predstavitelia zadržali v utorok 21 osôb. Sú údajne napojené na zločineckú sieť pašovateľov cigariet z Bieloruska prostredníctvom meteorologických balónov, ktoré narúšajú vzdušný priestor Litvy, informuje o tom agentúra AP. Vyšetrovatelia vykonali viac ako 80 prehliadok a zabavili cigarety s bieloruskými kolkami, SIM karty, zariadenia na rušenie komunikačných a sledovacích signálov a strelné zbrane, uviedla litovská generálna prokuratúra vo vyhlásení. Zabavili sa aj luxusné autá a cenný majetok. Litva začiatkom decembra vyhlásila v krajine núdzový stav pre bezpečnostné riziká spájané s meteorologické balóny z Bieloruska. Na operácii sa podieľalo v utorok viac ako 140 príslušníkov litovského úradu kriminálnej polície a špeciálnych protiteroristických jednotiek. Prokuratúra vo vyhlásení uviedla, že sieť sa „vyznačovala veľmi prísnym rozdelením úloh, pašovanie cigariet prebiehalo systematicky, koordinovane a pod prísnou kontrolou jej organizátorov (vodcov) a ich správcov“ . „Organizátori mohli mať priamy kontakt so spolupáchateľmi pôsobiacimi v Bielorusku, odkiaľ za priaznivého počasia vypúšťali balóny s pašovanými cigaretami,“ tvrdí prokuratúra. „Prostredníctvom sledovacieho zariadenia (GPS) a príslušných programov sa monitoroval pohyb balónov a presné súradnice ich pristátia v Litve sa odovzdávali,“ uviedli prokurátori. „Po zozbieraní kontrabandu museli...

title: México: Aumentan a diez los muertos en el accidente de un jet privado
content: Ciudad de México, 16 dic (EFE).- Los diez ocupantes de un jet privado murieron en un accidente ocurrido el lunes cuando al aparato se estrelló cerca del Aeropuerto Internacional de Toluca (AIT), en el central Estado de México, anunció este martes la presidenta de México, Claudia Sheinbaum. En su conferencia de prensa matutina en Palacio Nacional, Sheinbaum señaló que tiene que realizarse el peritaje de la Fiscalía General de la República (FGR) antes de poder identificar la causa del desplome de la aeronave; aunque admitió que podía ser un fallo técnico. “Todos fallecieron, incluido el piloto (...) La Fiscalía General de la República tiene que hacerlo (el peritaje)”, dijo Sheinbaum, quien detalló que se trataba de una familia que viajaba desde Acapulco hacia Toluca, incluidos tres menores de edad. La actualización de la mandataria ocurre tras el reporte difundido el lunes por Protección Civil del Estado de México, que informó que la cifra de fallecidos había aumentado a siete, luego de que los servicios de emergencia localizaran cuerpos en el sitio del impacto. En ese momento, las autoridades precisaron que el avión transportaba a ocho pasajeros, además del piloto y el copiloto, para un total de diez personas. De acuerdo con la Secretaría de Infraestructura, Comunicaciones y Transportes (SICT), el accidente ocurrió alrededor de las 12:31 hora local del lunes, al sur de las inmediaciones del Aeropuerto Internacional de Toluca, a 65 kilómetros al oeste...
